D6.en: He accepted the running so good-naturedly that upperclassmen lost interest in hazing him.
D6.zh: 他如此好脾气地接受了跑步，以至于高年级生失去了刁难他的兴趣。

D2.en: To prepare for entrance exams, he advanced his rising time to 3:00 a.m. and studied until 5:30.
D2.zh: 为准备入学考试，他把起床时间提前到凌晨3点，学习到5点半。

D3.en: He astonished the instructor by finding the right answer using his own method.
D3.zh: 他用自己独创的方法找到了正确答案，令教官惊讶。

D18.en: At 8, he worked as a delivery boy at a meat market for a dollar a week to help his family.
D18.zh: 8岁时，他在一家肉店做送货员，每周赚一美元补贴家用。

M7.en: He struggled through the entrance exam and was sworn in as a naval cadet on 7 July 1900.
M7.zh: 他拼命准备并通过了严格的入学考试，于1900年7月7日宣誓成为海军学员。

M2.en: He said, 'My father is a Naval officer.'
M2.zh: 他说：“我父亲是一名海军军官。”

M4.en: He and his father wanted to write another letter to the president, but his mother took matters into her own hands.
M4.zh: 他和父亲想再给总统写信，但他母亲自己采取了行动。

D16.en: He wrote a letter to President McKinley.
D16.zh: 他给麦金利总统写了一封信。

D14.en: He took some pleasure in marching at President McKinley's second inauguration.
D14.zh: 他参加麦金利总统第二次就职典礼的游行，感到有些愉快。

D18.en: He recognized a good thing and made the most of being invited to parties and introduced to pretty girls.
D18.zh: 他意识到这是个好事，充分利用了被邀请参加派对和结识漂亮女孩的机会。

D5.en: At 9-11, he broke street light globes with a slingshot.
D5.zh: 9到11岁时，他用弹弓打碎了路灯的灯罩。

M1.en: At 14, he asked for a Naval Academy appointment.
M1.zh: 14岁时，他请求获得海军军官学校的推荐名额。

D4.en: At 17-18, he set up a skeleton to scare friends and enjoyed their reactions.
D4.zh: 17到18岁时，他摆了一具骷髅吓唬朋友，并偷听他们的惊叫。

D9.en: At 16-17, he took Willie sailing and impressed him with his seamanship.
D9.zh: 16到17岁时，他带Willie出海，用航海技术给他留下深刻印象。

D6.en: At 17, he joined the Hustlers junior varsity football team.
D6.zh: 17岁时，他加入了校二队橄榄球队Hustlers。

D2.en: At 17-18, he prepared hard and struggled through the entrance exam.
D2.zh: 17到18岁时，他刻苦准备，艰难通过了入学考试。

D3.en: At 14-15, reading Henty's adventure stories made him want to be a sailor.
D3.zh: 14到15岁时，读Henty的冒险故事让他想当水手。

D12.en: At 17, his parents made a financial sacrifice to send him to Charlottesville.
D12.zh: 17岁时，他父母做出经济牺牲送他去夏洛茨维尔。

D20.en: He was inducted into the Delta Psi fraternity and wore its emblem on his watch chain.
D20.zh: 他被接纳加入Delta Psi兄弟会，此后一直把该会徽章挂在表链上。

D17.en: At 12, he was sent to a school in Pau run by a German for English families' sons.
D17.zh: 12岁时，他被送到波城一所由德国人开办、招收英国家庭子弟的学校。

D11.en: As a child and teenager, he loved drawing, making caricatures and cartoons.
D11.zh: 幼年到青少年时期，他热爱绘画，画讽刺画和漫画。

D4.en: As a small child, he was quick and clever with his fingers, making or mending things.
D4.zh: 幼年时，他手指灵巧，喜欢制作或修理东西。

D6.en: As a child, he wanted to become more companionable.
D6.zh: 小时候，他想变得更合群。

D2.en: As a child aged 5-12, he could keep himself occupied for hours, totally absorbed in his own private life.
D2.zh: 5到12岁时，他能让自己忙上几个小时，完全沉浸在自己的私人世界里。

D3.en: As a child aged 5-12, he was good at mathematics from the start.
D3.zh: 5到12岁时，他一开始就擅长数学。

D12.en: At 8, his father died and he was taken to see the body.
D12.zh: 8岁时，他父亲去世，他被带去看了遗体。

D9.en: At 17, he served as Assistant Adjutant during the relief of Ladysmith.
D9.zh: 17岁时，他在莱迪史密斯解围战中担任助理副官。

M4.en: At 15, he became an Instructor in the Glider Group of the Hitler Youth.
M4.zh: 15岁时，他成为希特勒青年团滑翔组的教官。

D13b.en: He found that the aviation school was strictly for mechanics, not flying training.
D13b.zh: 他发现航校只教机械，不教飞行。

D5.en: At 16, he made a smooth 98-foot ski jump and landed perfectly.
D5.zh: 16岁时，他平稳跳了98英尺并完美落地。

D15.en: At 16, he completed a free ski jump off a chalet roof, 18 feet above the professor's head.
D15.zh: 16岁时，他从教授头顶18英尺的屋顶完成自由滑雪跳跃。

D4.en: At 14, he was taken by his mother to gliding meets and took his turn with other boys.
D4.zh: 14岁时，母亲带他去滑翔集会，他和其他男孩轮流滑翔。

D9.en: At 18, he decided to enlist in the Luftwaffe.
D9.zh: 18岁时，他决定加入德国空军。

D7.en: At 17-18, he persisted in his plans despite his girlfriend's father's opposition.
D7.zh: 17到18岁时，他坚持自己的计划，不顾女友父亲的反对。

D6.en: He belonged to the Glider Gang, a group of boys from Frau Hartmann's gliding club.
D6.zh: 他属于滑翔帮，一群来自哈特曼夫人滑翔俱乐部的男孩。

D20X.en: At 13, he would sneak away from the field before a match ended.
D20X.zh: 13岁时，他会在比赛结束前偷偷溜出球场。

M8.en: At 13, he had a strong leaning towards the Stoics.
M8.zh: 13岁时，他强烈倾向于斯多葛学派。

D8.en: At 15-17, he was the dominant partner and initiator of their schemes.
D8.zh: 15到17岁间，他是他们计划中的主导者和发起者。

D19.en: At 18, his expenditure was frequently and carefully accounted for.
D19.zh: 18岁时，他的开支经常被仔细记录。

M2.en: At 18, he showed filial affection and concern for his mother's health.
M2.zh: 18岁时，他表现出孝心，关心母亲健康。

D20.en: At 18, he co-signed a school magazine contribution as 'Two Calcotripticians'.
D20.zh: 18岁时，他以'Two Calcotripticians'的署名合作投稿校刊。

M4.en: At about 17, he felt his great task in life was to escape from her.
M4.zh: 大约17岁时，他觉得他一生的重要任务就是逃离她。

D16.en: At 18, he already enjoyed making provocative remarks about people.
D16.zh: 18岁时，他已经喜欢对人发表挑衅性言论。

D10.en: At 13, he had a strong sense of humor that may have saved him many times in boyish troubles.
D10.zh: 13岁时，他很有幽默感，这可能多次帮他摆脱男孩时期的麻烦。

D14.en: As a teenager and young adult, he was regarded as a pronounced eccentric by peers.
D14.zh: 十几岁到二十出头时，他被同龄人视为明显的怪人。

D11.en: At 16, he contributed to the school magazine signed 'L.ii.'.
D11.zh: 16岁时，他以'L.ii.'的署名投稿校刊。

M1.en: At 17, he was nominated for a mathematics scholarship at Oxford.
M1.zh: 17岁时，他被提名牛津大学数学奖学金。

D15.en: As a teenager, he would dive through ice into the frozen river Cherwell on winter nights.
D15.zh: 十几岁时，他会在冬夜破冰跳入冰封的Cherwell河。

D9.en: As a child, he generally led his brothers in their games.
D9.zh: 幼年时，他通常带领兄弟们玩游戏。

D7.en: As a child, he refused to take part in organized sport.
D7.zh: 幼年时，他拒绝参加有组织的体育运动。

D6.en: As a teenager, he led paper-chases and joined playground games.
D6.zh: 十几岁时，他带领越野追逐赛并加入操场游戏。

D3.en: At 17-18, he developed an interest in medieval history through brass-rubbing and archaeology.
D3.zh: 17到18岁时，他通过拓印和考古对中世纪历史产生了兴趣。

D1.en: At 17, he appealed to his father for help and was bought out as a result.
D1.zh: 17岁时，他向父亲求助，结果被赎了出来。

D5.en: At 17, he enlisted as a boy soldier in the Royal Garrison Artillery.
D5.zh: 17岁时，他作为少年兵加入了皇家驻防炮兵部队。

M4.en: From his earliest years, he imbibed a yearning for national independence.
M4.zh: 从幼年起，他就渴望民族独立，从外国人手中解放土地。

D10.en: At age 6-7, he went home, cried, and refused to leave his room for two days.
D10.zh: 6到7岁时，他回家哭了两天，不肯出房间。

D1.en: At 17, he felt betrayed by his scores but was told the Haganah would need all commanders.
D1.zh: 17岁时，他对成绩感到失望，但被告知哈加纳需要所有指挥官。

D13b.en: In his mid-teens, he swore allegiance to the Haganah in a secret ceremony.
D13b.zh: 十几岁时，他在秘密仪式上宣誓效忠哈加纳。

D13a.en: At 6, his father armed him with a club and ordered him to search for fruit thieves.
D13a.zh: 6岁时，他父亲给他一根棍子，命令他去找偷水果的孩子。

D18.en: At 8, he began picking oranges and loading them onto the family's horse-drawn wagon.
D18.zh: 8岁时，他开始摘橙子并装上家里的马车。

D5.en: He smuggled firearms between villages, violating British law.
D5.zh: 他在村庄之间走私枪支，违反了英国法律。

D15.en: At 18, he preferred to teach material his own way instead of using prepared lessons.
D15.zh: 18岁时，他喜欢用自己的方式教学，不用现成的教案。

D9.en: At 14-15, he joined the Gadna paramilitary youth battalion and transformed himself.
D9.zh: 14到15岁时，他加入了准军事青年营Gadna，并在此期间改变了自己。

D7.en: At 18, he refused, claiming the risk of discovery by British police was too high.
D7.zh: 18岁时，他拒绝了，声称被英国警察发现的风险太高。

D6.en: At 14-18, his military career started in the Gadna, a para-military high-school organization.
D6.zh: 14到18岁时，他的军事生涯始于Gadna，一个准军事高中组织。

D2.en: At 13-14, he had to wake up in the dark and work in the fields before taking the bus to school.
D2.zh: 13到14岁时，他不得不在天没亮时起床，下地干活，然后坐公交去上学。

D4.en: At 8-10, he was an expert bomb maker, the village champion.
D4.zh: 8到10岁时，他是制造炸弹的专家，村里的冠军。

D5.en: At 16-17, he decided to leave Ganzhou for Guizhou to apply to Zhejiang University with equivalent academic qualifications.
D5.zh: 16到17岁时，他决心离开赣州奔赴贵州，以同等学历报考浙大。

D4.en: At 16, he was asked to teach lower-grade math and physics classes because there was no teacher.
D4.zh: 16岁时，学校没有老师，就让他登台授课。

D9.en: At 16, he effectively acted as a teacher when students studied on their own without a teacher.
D9.zh: 16岁时，没有老师，他实际上充当了教师的角色。

D3.en: At 16, he read a book about Newton's three laws and became curious.
D3.zh: 16岁时，他读到一本讲牛顿三大定律的书，很好奇。

D7.en: At 15, he was very angry and decided to leave Shanghai.
D7.zh: 15岁时，他非常愤怒，下决心离开上海。

D1.en: At 9, with his uncle's help, he overcame difficulties and ranked first in the final exam.
D1.zh: 9岁时，在姑丈帮助下克服困难，学期总考全班第一名。

D13b.en: At 8, he refused to go to school after seeing a teacher hit students with a ruler.
D13b.zh: 8岁时，他看到老师用戒尺打学生手心，第二天就不肯去上学了。

D11.en: At 15, he published a poem titled 'Don't Be a Kite' in the school magazine.
D11.zh: 15岁时，他在校刊上发表新诗《不做纸鸢儿》。

D2.en: At 15, he self-studied analytic geometry for three weeks amid a family funeral and passed the exam.
D2.zh: 15岁时，他在祖母丧事环境中自学三周解析几何，就去考试了。

D3.en: At 12-15, he often spent hours in the library, browsing books until closing time.
D3.zh: 12到15岁时，他时常在书库里一呆几个钟头，直到关门才出来。

M1.en: At 15, he was admitted to Nankai University with the second highest math score.
M1.zh: 15岁时，他考取南开大学，数学成绩全体考生第二名。

D2.en: At 18, after a two-year break due to illness, she entered Ningbo Private Xiaoshi High School.
D2.zh: 18岁时，休学两年病情好转后，她进入宁波私立效实中学高中就读。

D16.en: At 13-14, he participated in a speech contest with the topic 'The Responsibility of Middle School Students'.
D16.zh: 13到14岁时，他参加演讲比赛，题目是“中学生的责任”。

D13b.en: As a small child, his mother taught him manners and retrained him from left-handed to right-handed for eating and writing.
D13b.zh: 幼年时，母亲教他做人的道理，并把他吃饭和写字改成用右手。

M1.en: At 16, he ranked second among over 20,000 examinees to enter Southwest Associated University.
M1.zh: 16岁时，他在两万多名考生中以第二名考进西南联大。

D4.en: At age 12-14, he made a slide projector himself using a paper box, a light bulb, and a lens.
D4.zh: 12到14岁时，他自己动手做了一个幻灯机，用纸盒子、灯泡和透镜做成。

D6.en: On weekends, he returned to Longyuan Village and told stories to his siblings and neighbor kids.
D6.zh: 每到周末他回到龙院村家里，给弟妹和邻居小孩讲故事。

D2.en: At 5, he studied with cousins under an old teacher and memorized the primer "Longwen Biying" fluently.
D2.zh: 5岁时，他和堂兄弟姐妹一起跟老先生读书，把《龙文鞭影》背得滚瓜烂熟。

D3.en: At age 6 in 1928, he showed unusual observation by picking delicate and mostly tiny shells, noticed by his father.
D3.zh: 1928年他6岁时，他挑的贝壳常常很精致而且多半极小，展现出不同常人的观察力。

D12.en: At 12-13, he was the general manager of his siblings' life and studies.
D12.zh: 12到13岁时，他是弟妹生活和学习的总管。

D1.en: At 17-18, he stayed at the top of his class, barely beating his friend Moshe Netzer.
D1.zh: 17到18岁时，他保持班级第一，勉强击败朋友Moshe Netzer。

D5.en: At 15, his school came under attack, but it was more sabre-rattling.
D5.zh: 15岁时，他的学校遭到攻击，但更像是虚张声势。

M1.en: At 13-14, he found it hard to accept failure, so he studied very hard.
M1.zh: 13到14岁时，他难以接受失败，因此学习非常努力。

D15.en: At 15-17, he adored soccer and went to matches on Saturdays with his father.
D15.zh: 15到17岁时，他热爱足球，每周六和父亲一起去看比赛。

D4.en: At 6-10, he learned to mend shoes and make chairs in the workshop.
D4.zh: 6到10岁时，他在作坊里学会了修鞋和做椅子。

D7.en: At 6-14, he had no intention of making more effort; he was content to go at his own speed.
D7.zh: 6到14岁时，他无意再努力，满足于按自己的节奏前进。

D6.en: As a small child, he played with neighborhood children in a safe place where they couldn't cause damage.
D6.zh: 幼年时，他和邻居孩子们在一个不会造成破坏的地方玩耍。

D2.en: He had to finish all food on his plate as a child.
D2.zh: 他小时候必须把盘子里的食物吃光。

D3.en: Out of curiosity, he visited a synagogue across the street and got to know its rabbi well.
D3.zh: 出于好奇，他去了街对面的犹太会堂，并和那里的拉比熟络起来。

D10.en: He lost his temper and falsely accused his wife of losing his ginseng.
D10.zh: 他大发雷霆，诬赖由昆把他的西洋参弄丢了。

D18.en: He was responsible for scooping water and did it meticulously.
D18.zh: 他负责舀水，干得一丝不苟。

D5.en: He applied to Xiamen University as an同等学力 candidate before graduating high school.
D5.zh: 他高中尚未毕业，以同等学力报考厦门大学。

D7.en: He stubbornly said he would walk to Xiamen University if needed.
D7.zh: 他倔强地回答：“就是走路，我也要走到厦大去！”

D6.en: As a child, he played with slingshots and had fun with his brother and classmates.
D6.zh: 小时候，他玩弹弓，和弟弟及同学们玩得很开心。

D2.en: At 15-17, he memorized a chemistry book and recited it aloud in class.
D2.zh: 15到17岁时，他背下了一本化学书，并在老师和同学面前流利背诵。

D3.en: At 15-17, he borrowed college-level math and physics books from the library.
D3.zh: 15到17岁时，他借阅了大学丛书《微积分学》、《达夫物理学》等高等教材。

D1.en: He spent five years self-studying all high school and early college math courses.
D1.zh: 他花了五年时间自学了高中三年和大学初年级的全部数学课程。

D13a.en: He decided to drop out of school and returned to Jintan without a diploma.
D13a.zh: 他决定退学，放弃了还差一学期就毕业的机会，没拿到文凭就回到了金坛。

D18.en: He could only find a few math books and two magazines in Jintan.
D18.zh: 他在家乡金坛能看到的数学书只有《大代数》《解析几何》和一本约50页的《微积分》，还有《科学》和《学艺》两本杂志。

M1.en: A spirit of striving to not fall behind overwhelmed him as a dropout youth.
M1.zh: 一种不甘落伍和沉沦的进取精神，在失学青年华罗庚的心目中压倒了一切。

D7.en: At 15, he confidently presented his own new problem-solving method on the blackboard, but the teacher insisted it was wrong.
D7.zh: 15岁时，他理直气壮地在黑板上讲自己创造的解题新方法，但老师固执地说他不对。

D2.en: At 15-16, after closing the shop, he ate quickly and returned to his small room to study math by oil lamp.
D2.zh: 15到16岁时，他关店后胡乱吃几口饭，就回小木板房点油灯攻读数学。

D3.en: At 14, he excitedly brought a two-page paper on Fermat's Last Theorem to his teacher Wang Weike.
D3.zh: 14岁时，他兴冲冲地拿一篇关于费马最后定理的论文给老师王维克。

M5.en: At age 9-10, he felt he must maintain masculine dignity as the older brother.
M5.zh: 9到10岁时，他觉得作为哥哥必须在弟弟面前保持男子汉的尊严。

M8.en: At age 9-10, he wished the falling Japanese bombs were grains of rice.
M8.zh: 9到10岁时，他幻想天上落下的不是炸弹而是一粒粒谷子。

M7.en: His unsettled childhood fostered his patriotism and sympathy for the people.
M7.zh: 动荡的童年培养了他的爱国情怀和对人民的同情。

D16.en: At age 12, he vowed never to write cliché idioms like 'time flies' again.
D16.zh: 12岁时，他暗自发誓再也不写“光阴似箭，日月如梭”这类人云亦云的成语。

D10.en: At age 12, he blushed but stubbornly held his head high when classmates laughed at him.
D10.zh: 12岁时，他在同学们的哄笑中倔强地挺着腰杆，脖子根都红了。

D1.en: At age 18, he pretended to obey his teacher but secretly decided to join the tryouts.
D1.zh: 18岁时，他表面听话回去，心里却打定主意要参加选拔赛。

D14.en: As a child, he cheated his aunt when playing cards.
D14.zh: 小时候，他打牌时骗他姨妈。

D18.en: At age 9-10, he dragged his brother into swimming so they'd be punished together.
D18.zh: 9到10岁时，他拉弟弟一起下河游泳，这样挨打也是一起挨。

D11.en: As a teen, he was a fan of Chaplin, Tarzan, and Arabian Nights, and showed off tap-dancing learned from movies.
D11.zh: 十几岁时，他是卓别林、泰山和《一千零一夜》的粉丝，还炫耀从电影里学的踢踏舞。

M1.en: At 18, he won first place in the 100m and 400m freestyle in Hankou.
M1.zh: 18岁时，他在汉口赛区夺得男子100米和400米自由泳两个第一名。

D15.en: At age 10, he dared to swim across the Yangtze River.
D15.zh: 10岁时，他敢横渡长江。

D7.en: At 17-18, his family objected to his choice, but he was resolute.
D7.zh: 17到18岁时，家人反对他的选择，但他很坚决。

D6.en: At 7-9, he sat under a tree with siblings listening to mother's stories.
D6.zh: 7到9岁时，他搬小板凳围在母亲身边，在树下乘凉听故事。

D2.en: At 4-7, he ate neatly and picked up dropped rice under grandfather's glare.
D2.zh: 4到7岁时，他规规矩矩吃饭，掉米粒会被爷爷瞪眼，赶紧捡起来。

D3.en: At 7, he imagined an ancient farmer while listening to mother's story.
D3.zh: 7岁时，他听着母亲的故事，眼前浮现远古农人的身影。

M4.en: At 18, he saw poorly written Chinese characters and felt his blood rush, trembling with rage at the national insult.
M4.zh: 18岁时，他看到歪歪扭扭的中国汉字，感觉血液直冲头顶，因国家受辱而愤怒颤抖。

D1.en: At 15, he returned to high school after his father's death, urged by his uncle and father's dying wish.
D1.zh: 15岁时，在父亲去世后，他听从四叔的建议，回到苏州高中并更加努力。

D13a.en: At 18, he followed his uncle's advice.
D13a.zh: 18岁时，他听从了叔父的建议。

D11.en: At 5-8, he was taught by his uncle to create short titles for stories in a magazine.
D11.zh: 5到8岁时，八叔让他为《小说月报》的短文拟短标题，越短越好。

D15.en: At 7, he joyfully waded into a clear river to collect snails, frogs, and small fish.
D15.zh: 7岁时，他兴奋地跳进清澈的小河摸螺蛳、捉田鸡、捞小虾小鱼。

D4.en: At 5, he practiced writing with a wet brush on a polished brick provided by his uncle.
D4.zh: 5岁时，他用蘸水的毛笔在叔叔磨光的方砖上练字。

D9.en: At 16, he volunteered to solve a problem in class, speaking with a trembling voice.
D9.zh: 16岁时，他举手说愿意试试解题，声音颤抖。

D7.en: At 7, he skipped school because he found class boring.
D7.zh: 7岁时，他因觉得课堂枯燥而逃学。

D2.en: At age 7, he went to Goose Lake every morning to recite texts, ignoring distractions from fishermen and children.
D2.zh: 7岁时，他每天清晨去鹅湖旁背诵课文，从不凑热闹看渔民捕鱼，专心致志。

D3.en: As a small child, he devoured books in his father's study, reading everything from Romance of the Three Kingdoms to Zuo Zhuan.
D3.zh: 幼年时，他在父亲的书房里如饥似渴地读书，不管什么书都看，包括《三国演义》和《左传》。

D18.en: At 7, he learned embroidery from his mother, earning money for cushions and curtains.
D18.zh: 7岁时，他跟母亲学挑花，挑椅垫挣五六分钱，挑窗帘挣一两毛钱。

D19.en: At 10-12, he made a small notebook to copy favorite articles and poems.
D19.zh: 10到12岁时，他自制了一个小摘抄本，记录喜欢的文章和诗句。

M2.en: At 9, he saw his sister's name on the honor roll and decided to study hard for college.
M2.zh: 9岁时，他看到大姐的名字上了光荣榜，决心也要读书考大学。

D1.en: At 17, he failed to finish the exam on time and panicked at unfamiliar questions.
D1.zh: 17岁时，他没在规定时间内做完考题，看着超纲题冒汗六神无主。

D13a.en: As a child, his father calmly explained the importance of studying, telling him it was the only way to succeed.
D13a.zh: 小时候，父亲心平气和地跟他讲道理，告诉他只有好好学习才是唯一的出路。

D11.en: As a child, he loved to play Monkey King, wrapping a sheet as a skirt and wielding a stick as a staff.
D11.zh: 小时候，他喜欢演孙悟空，把床单裹在身上当皮裙，挥舞木棍当金箍棒。

M1.en: At 17, unsatisfied with second place, he eagerly prepared to redeem himself in the finals.
M1.zh: 17岁时，他不满足于得第二，摩拳擦掌要在决赛中一雪前耻。

D9.en: At 8, he was appointed class discipline monitor by the teacher.
D9.zh: 8岁时，他被老师看重，担任班级纪律委员。

D7.en: At 8-9, he fought back when bullied.
D7.zh: 8到9岁时，他被人欺负时毫不示弱，该出手时就出手。

D6.en: At 16-17, he secretly surveyed classes and found top students all chose science, so he did too.
D6.zh: 16到17岁时，他偷偷到各班调查，发现尖子生都选理科，于是他也选了理科。

D2.en: In his senior year, he studied late every night and filled several notebooks with wrong answers.
D2.zh: 高三时，他每天挑灯夜战，用心准备模拟考试，半年里总结错题有好几个本子。

D3.en: At 17, he saw many computer books in the provincial capital bookstore, unavailable in Yangquan.
D3.zh: 17岁时，他在省城书店看到很多计算机书，阳泉根本看不到。

D14.en: As a child, he joyfully auditioned for a local opera troupe and was accepted on the spot.
D14.zh: 小时候，他兴高采烈地报名晋剧团招生，面试时表演了动作，被当场录取。

D1.en: At 16, he was expelled for joining an anti-US school strike, then studied at a new school founded by Chen Baochen.
D1.zh: 16岁时，他因参加反美罢课被开除，后转入陈宝琛新办的中学学习一年。

D9.en: At 16, he transferred to a new school founded by Chen Baochen for expelled patriotic students.
D9.zh: 16岁时，他和同学们一起转入陈宝琛为收容被开除学生而新办的中学。

D7.en: At 15, he resolutely joined a student strike at Anglo-Chinese College.
D7.zh: 15岁时，他毅然参加英华书院的学生罢课。

D2.en: As a small child, he recited texts while herding cattle, pumping water, and even cooking.
D2.zh: 幼年时，他放牛时带着书，车水时诵读不已，烧火时也念念有词。

D3.en: At 10-13, he learned many novel things in his aunt's attic, broadening his horizons.
D3.zh: 10到13岁时，他在姑妈的小阁楼里知道了很多新鲜事，大开眼界。

D12.en: As a small child, he worked alongside his father, doing farm chores while studying with his grandfather.
D12.zh: 幼年时，他随祖父读书，并和父亲一起放牛、车水、积肥、插秧，过着半耕半读的生活。

D13a.en: At 14, he married Zhang Shuchun, a peasant girl, as arranged by his parents.
D13a.zh: 14岁时，他奉父母之命与农民出身的张淑春结婚。

D14.en: He organized family concerts, acting as both conductor and performer.
D14.zh: 他经常策划家庭音乐会，既当指挥又当表演者。

D18.en: He saved his New Year's money and checked book prices before buying.
D18.zh: 他把压岁钱攒下来，记下书价后回家数钱看是否买得起。

D11.en: At 13, he expressed in his autobiography a strong desire to become a scientist.
D11.zh: 13岁时，他在自传中抒发了当科学家的热切愿望。

D4.en: At 7, he made a paper airplane with different paper thickness and wing size, and it flew high and far.
D4.zh: 7岁时，他做的纸飞机头尾纸的厚薄和机翼大小与众不同，飞得又高又远。

D9.en: At 12-13, he became an important organizer in baseball and table tennis due to his authority and skill.
D9.zh: 12到13岁时，他凭威信和球技成为棒球和桌球的重要组织者。

D7.en: At 13, he told the principal, 'See, we won despite your hope we'd lose; it's our skill, not divine blessing.'
D7.zh: 13岁时，他对校长说：你看，我们打赢了，是我们技术好，不是神灵保佑。

D6.en: At 12-13, he was a main baseball player in 5th grade and selected for the table tennis team in 6th grade.
D6.zh: 12到13岁时，他五年级是棒球队主力，六年级被选进桌球队。

D2.en: He read books carefully, rereading interesting ones, thinking critically, and taking notes.
D2.zh: 他看书认真，对感兴趣的书重复看，思考观点正误，并做读书笔记。

D3.en: As a child, his favorite reading was 'Kaiming Youth Monthly', which promoted social improvement and national pride.
D3.zh: 少年时，他最喜欢读《开明少年月刊》，书中宣扬改善社会和民族自尊。

M5.en: At 16, he told his brother, 'Now I have only hatred, no tears.'
M5.zh: 16岁时，他对弟弟说：“现在我只有仇恨，没有眼泪。”

D20.en: At 12-15, at Chongde Middle School, he became good friends with Yang Zhenning, who was two grades above.
D20.zh: 12到15岁时，在崇德中学，他和比他高两班的杨振宁成为好友。

M4.en: At 13, after feeling national humiliation, he began gathering with classmates to discuss the country's fate.
M4.zh: 13岁时，强烈的民族屈辱感刺伤了他，之后他开始和一些同学聚会，谈论国家的命运和前途。

D16.en: At 11-13, he often told his brother, 'Turgenev's Rudin says, "Don't be a giant of words, a dwarf of deeds."'
D16.zh: 11到13岁时，他常对弟弟说：“屠格涅夫的《罗婷》里说‘不要做言语的巨人，行动的矮子’，这句话说得真好。”

D10.en: At 16, he told his younger brother, 'Now I only have hatred, no tears.'
D10.zh: 16岁时，他对弟弟说：“现在我只有仇恨，没有眼泪。”

D13b.en: At 16, he was sent to Jiangjin, Sichuan, and graduated from high school in 1941.
D13b.zh: 16岁时，他被送到四川江津，于1941年高中毕业。

D13a.en: At 16, he was sent to Jiangjin, Sichuan, and graduated from high school in 1941.
D13a.zh: 16岁时，他被送到四川江津，1941年高中毕业。

D18.en: As a small child, he bought pastries on the way to school and ate them as breakfast.
D18.zh: 幼年时，他每天上学路上买枣糕锅饼当早点。

D5.en: As a child, he fell into icy water and was rescued, though he was known as timid.
D5.zh: 幼年时，他掉进冰水里被救起，尽管他平时很胆小。

M1.en: At 13-17, he ranked among the top in his class.
M1.zh: 13到17岁间，他成绩在班上名列前茅。

D15.en: At 17, he narrowly escaped death when Japanese planes bombed near the Yangtze River.
D15.zh: 17岁时，他在长江边遭遇日军轰炸，险遭不测。

D7.en: At 13-17, he tore up a paper flag and stomped on it in anger after a meeting.
D7.zh: 13到17岁间，他会后把纸旗扯碎并踩了一脚。

D6.en: At 13-17, he gathered with radical classmates to discuss world affairs and inspire each other.
D6.zh: 13到17岁间，他和激进同学聚会议论天下大事。

D2.en: At 11-13, he was obsessed with math, doing problems late into the night.
D2.zh: 11到13岁时，他对数学着了迷，每晚做题到深夜。

D3.en: At 13-17, he often went to used book stalls to find banned progressive books.
D3.zh: 13到17岁时，他常去旧书摊找被禁的进步书籍。

D12.en: At age 5, he started primary school and also attended a private tutor's home to study classics like Zuo Zhuan and the Analects.
D12.zh: 5岁时，他上小学，课余又去私塾王老先生家借读《左传》《论语》等经典。

M6.en: At 16, he fantasized about riding a rocket into space.
M6.zh: 16岁时，他幻想乘坐火箭遨游太空。

D14.en: As a teenager, he taught Western painting in a summer class and learned Chinese painting using watercolors.
D14.zh: 十几岁时，他开办暑期绘画班教西洋画，买不起油彩就用水彩学画，也学中国画。

D11.en: At 16, he read a book about rockets and fantasized about riding one into space.
D11.zh: 16岁时，他读了《飞往星际空间的火箭》，幻想乘坐火箭遨游太空。

M1.en: At 18, he ranked third in the entrance exam for Jiaotong University.
M1.zh: 18岁时，他以总分第三名考取交通大学。

D9.en: At 18, he entered Jiaotong University.
D9.zh: 18岁时，他跨进交通大学校门。

D12.en: He was born in Shanghai on December 11, 1911, the same year as the Xinhai Revolution.
D12.zh: 他于1911年12月11日出生在上海，与辛亥革命同年。

M7.en: As a girl, she aspired to do what men could do, like her father and uncle.
M7.zh: 她作为女儿身，心中一直有来日要如父亲叔叔一样做男子汉能做的事情的抱负。

D20.en: She went door-to-door with her father to persuade families to send children to school.
D20.zh: 她跟着父亲挨家挨户去说服乡民送子女上学。

D16.en: She joked with a classmate, asking if she had read Dream of the Red Chamber.
D16.zh: 她碰见同学严梅和，开玩笑问她有没有看过《红楼梦》。

D1.en: She would stay up late trying to solve a math problem.
D1.zh: 她为了数学难题拼命想，有时想不出来到很晚还不睡觉。

D14.en: She went to hear a lecture again.
D14.zh: 她特别又跑去听他的演讲。

D11.en: As a small child, she learned poetry, characters, and arithmetic.
D11.zh: 她幼年时和许多小孩一样，从诗文背诵、识方块字和算学起步学习。

M1.en: At 17, she received a perfect score from Hu Shih, who praised her deep understanding of Qing thought.
M1.zh: 17岁时，她得了胡适给的一百分，胡适称赞她对清朝思想史懂得透彻。

D9.en: As a small child, she went door-to-door with her father to persuade villagers to send children to school.
D9.zh: 幼年时，她跟着父亲挨家挨户说服乡民送子女上学。

D3.en: At 17, she was captivated by Hu Shih's erudition and eloquence in class.
D3.zh: 17岁时，她被胡适渊博的学识和口才倾倒。

D12.en: As a small child, she showed unusual intelligence in learning poetry, characters, and math.
D12.zh: 幼年时，她在诗文背诵、识字和算学中显现出不寻常的智力。

M5.en: At 18, he was named a model student activist at Peking University.
M5.zh: 18岁时，他被评为了北大三好学生积极分子。

D17.en: At 17, he pooled money with others to buy winter clothes for someone.
D17.zh: 17岁时，他和大家一起凑钱给某人买了过冬的衣服。

M2.en: He told his mother he would achieve academic success and become the pride of the family like his siblings.
M2.zh: 他对妈说，他会学有所成，像哥哥姐姐们一样成为家里的骄傲。

D4.en: At age 5-10, he read a book on catching crickets to catch good ones.
D4.zh: 5到10岁时，他翻阅了捕捉蛐蛐的书，为了捉到佳品。

D9.en: At 17, classmates elected him as the Youth League branch secretary.
D9.zh: 17岁时，同学们选他为团支部书记。

D2.en: At age 4, he was sent to Nanmo Kindergarten by his parents.
D2.zh: 他4岁时被父母送进了南模幼儿园。

D3.en: Around age 13-14, he developed a strong interest in math and felt textbooks were insufficient.
D3.zh: 13到14岁时，他对数学产生了浓厚兴趣，觉得课本知识不够吃。

D12.en: He was born as the fifth child to a Wang family in Shanghai on February 5, 1937.
D12.zh: 1937年2月5日，他作为王家的第五个孩子出生在上海衡山路964弄。

D7.en: At 11, he decided to defy authority and enroll in Nanmo, becoming its first student.
D7.zh: 11岁时，他决定自己做主，去南模当个空前绝后的‘元老’学生。

M7.en: She set out to help illiterate children by giving them two hours of school daily.
M7.zh: 她每天花两小时教不识字的孩子们读书。

M4.en: She taught illiterate peasant children how to read and write in Polish.
M4.zh: 她教不识字的农民孩子用波兰语读写。

D13a.en: She spent the summer in blissful happiness, taking a complete break from her studies.
D13a.zh: 她整个夏天都沉浸在幸福中，完全放下了学业。

D18.en: At 18, she worked for the Zorawski family for 500 rubles a year.
D18.zh: 18岁时，她为Zorawski家工作，年薪500卢布。

D11.en: She picked up Bronya's book and read aloud the first sentence flawlessly.
D11.zh: 她拿起Bronya的书，完美地读出了第一句话。

M1.en: At 15, she finished first in her class and was awarded the gold medal.
M1.zh: 15岁时，她以班级第一名的成绩获得金牌。

D7.en: At age 10, she and other youngsters spat at an obelisk erected by the Tsar.
D7.zh: 10岁时，她和孩子们朝沙皇竖立的方尖碑吐口水。

D2.en: At 11, she carried on with her schoolwork with no sign of grief and remained at the top of her class.
D2.zh: 11岁时，她继续学业，没有表现出悲伤，成绩仍名列前茅。

M2.en: To comfort her mother's spirit, she decided to study medicine.
M2.zh: 为了告慰妈妈的在天之灵，她决定学医。

D14.en: She was an active participant in performances, almost always involved.
D14.zh: 她是这类活动的积极参加者，每次演出几乎都少不了她。

M1.en: She was never satisfied with second best; if others scored 100, she wanted 101.
M1.zh: 别人考一百分，她不甘心考九十九；别人拍一千下皮球，她要拍一千零一下。

D4.en: She crocheted a black hairnet with fine thread, her hands moving skillfully and swiftly.
D4.zh: 她用勾针勾织着一个黑色发网，线细网小，但她动作娴熟，两手灵活飞针挑线。

D6.en: At age 5-7, her playmates nicknamed her 'Do-re-mi'.
D6.zh: 5到7岁时，小朋友们给她起绰号叫“哆咧咪”。

D3.en: As a teenager and young adult, she stayed up late reading voraciously, befriending characters like Romeo and Jane Eyre.
D3.zh: 十几岁到二十岁时，她常常在灯下贪婪地读到深夜，罗密欧、简·爱等成了她的朋友。

D12.en: At age 5, she lost her mother to cervical cancer.
D12.zh: 5岁时，她母亲因宫颈癌病故，她过早失去了慈母之爱。

D13b.en: At age seven, she participated in baptism.
D13b.zh: 七岁那年，她参加了受洗礼。

D17.en: As a small child, he saw an old woman shivering in the cold, so he ran home to get her clothes.
D17.zh: 幼年时，他看到老婆婆没穿衣服在寒风中发抖，就跑回家找母亲要衣服给她穿。

M4.en: At 16, he joined Sun Yat-sen's Tongmenghui in Japan and was told to 'study hard for the nation.'
M4.zh: 16岁时，他在日本加入孙中山的同盟会，孙中山勉励他“努力向学，蔚为国用”。

D18.en: At 18, he did small things that left a lasting impression on local villagers after returning from Japan.
D18.zh: 18岁时，他从日本回来做了一些小事，给当地乡亲留下了难忘的印象。

D4.en: At 18, he built a water filter using two jars, sand, and stones to turn pond water clear.
D4.zh: 18岁时，他买来大小缸，凿孔装竹管，用沙石过滤塘水，使浑水变清。

D9.en: At 16, he participated in a protest against Japanese regulations restricting Chinese students.
D9.zh: 16岁时，他参加东京中国留日学生总会反对日本限制中国留学生的斗争。

D7.en: At 16, he attended the preparatory meeting of the Tongmenghui and swore allegiance to join.
D7.zh: 16岁时，他参加同盟会筹备会，由孙中山主盟宣誓加入。

D6.en: He was classmates with Chen Houfu while studying in Japan.
D6.zh: 他在日本留学时与陈厚甫是同学。

D2.en: As a small child, he studied daily: reciting before breakfast, then lessons, calligraphy, and night study with his brother.
D2.zh: 幼年时，他每天早饭前朗读背诵，饭后听课练字，晚间和哥哥挑灯学习到深夜。

D3.en: As a small child, he wondered why a certain rock was different from its surroundings and where it came from.
D3.zh: 幼年时，他对一块石头产生疑问：为什么周围没有这种石头，它是从哪里来的？

D12.en: As a small child, he helped his mother with chores like chopping wood, grinding rice, and carrying water.
D12.zh: 幼年时，他帮母亲打柴、舂米、推磨、提水，样样都做。

D13a.en: His father required him to practice calligraphy and memorize classical texts.
D13a.zh: 父亲要求他读书练字，背诵古文诗词。

D18.en: At 15, he started tutoring math, a small step toward his future career.
D18.zh: 15岁时，他开始替别人补习数学，迈向未来事业的一小步。

D7.en: He secretly read books his father forbade, hiding in the bathroom.
D7.zh: 他躲在洗手间偷偷阅读父亲不许他看的书。

D2.en: As a child, he attended his father's weekly calligraphy and poetry lessons with his brothers and neighborhood boys.
D2.zh: 幼年时，他每周和兄弟及邻家男孩一起上父亲教的书法诗词课。

D11.en: As a child, he disliked studying and played in the countryside, even skipping school for half a year.
D11.zh: 他年少时不喜欢读书，在元朗平原和沙田山海间嬉戏，甚至逃学半年。

D12.en: As a child aged 6-11, he carried ten gallons of water uphill for 800 meters, a hard chore.
D12.zh: 6到11岁时，他要背十加仑水上山走八百米，对小孩来说很辛苦。

M6.en: He wondered about space and time only as an adult, then delved deeper than any other adult would have.
M6.zh: 他直到成年才开始思考时空问题，但钻研得比任何其他成年人都深。

M4.en: He decided to give up his German citizenship.
M4.zh: 他决定放弃德国国籍。

D16.en: He expressed his personal opinion undauntedly, whether it offended or not.
D16.zh: 他无所畏惧地表达个人意见，不管是否冒犯别人。

D1.en: His family moved to Italy; he stayed in Munich to finish school but was unhappy and quit, joining them at year's end.
D1.zh: 他家搬到意大利；他留在慕尼黑完成学业，但不开心并退学，年底与家人团聚。

D14.en: He tried to impress her with his violin playing.
D14.zh: 他试图用小提琴演奏给她留下印象。

D13b.en: He entered the Swiss Federal Polytechnical Institute in October.
D13b.zh: 他于十月进入瑞士联邦理工学院。

D13a.en: He planned to give up his German citizenship.
D13a.zh: 他计划放弃德国国籍。

D11.en: He wrote his first scientific essay, reflecting his interest in electromagnetic phenomena.
D11.zh: 他写了第一篇科学文章，反映了他对电磁现象的兴趣。

M1.en: At 7, he got top grades and a brilliant report card.
M1.zh: 7岁时，他得了第一名，成绩单很出色。

D4.en: At 5, his father showed him a compass, fascinating him.
D4.zh: 5岁时，他父亲给他看了一个指南针，让他着迷。

D9.en: At 17, he seriously began engaging in philosophical discussions.
D9.zh: 17岁时，他开始认真参与哲学讨论。

D2.en: At 13, he became a good violinist and read science books voraciously.
D2.zh: 13岁时，他成了不错的小提琴手，并大量阅读科学书籍。

D3.en: At 16, he first became curious about electromagnetic theory during his time in Pavia.
D3.zh: 16岁时，他在帕维亚期间开始对电磁理论产生好奇。

D10.en: He threw a chair at his violin teacher during a tantrum.
D10.zh: 他发脾气时朝小提琴老师扔了一把椅子。

D8.en: At 8, he swung his fists at bullies teasing him.
D8.zh: 8岁时，他挥拳面对欺负他的大孩子。

M3.en: At 12, classmates nicknamed him Einstein.
M3.zh: 12岁时，同学给他起外号叫爱因斯坦。

M6.en: At 15-17, he wanted to fathom the depths of the universe.
M6.zh: 15到17岁时，他想探索宇宙的奥秘。

D20.en: At 16-17, he insisted on studying math and physics and won the argument with his father.
D20.zh: 16到17岁时，他坚持学数学和物理，并说服了父亲。

D1.en: At 17, he achieved nearly perfect marks in physics entrance exams.
D1.zh: 17岁时，他在物理入学考试中得了近乎满分。

D13b.en: At 10, his father enrolled him at St. Albans School.
D13b.zh: 10岁时，父亲送他进了圣奥尔本斯学校。

D13a.en: At 15, he agreed to take math, physics, and chemistry A Levels after discussion.
D13a.zh: 15岁时，经过讨论他同意选数学、物理和化学A Level。

D5.en: He once received a 500-volt shock from an old TV he was trying to convert into an amplifier.
D5.zh: 他有一次试图把旧电视改装成放大器时，遭到了500伏电击。

D11.en: At 13-15, he invented board games of astounding complexity.
D11.zh: 13到15岁时，他发明了极其复杂的棋盘游戏。

M1.en: From the start, he intended to go for a scholarship, the highest award offered by the university.
M1.zh: 从一开始，他就打算争取奖学金，那是大学提供的最高奖项。

D15.en: He rowed and coxed for Univ, exerting himself far more on the river.
D15.zh: 他在河上划船和当舵手，为Univ付出更多努力。

D4.en: He crumpled up the paper disdainfully and propelled it across the room into the wastepaper basket.
D4.zh: 他轻蔑地把纸揉成一团，扔过房间，丢进了废纸篓。

D9.en: At 17-18, he helped build a computer called LUCE.
D9.zh: 17到18岁时，他参与建造了一台名为LUCE的计算机。

D7.en: He failed to complete any tutorial questions, then spent 20 minutes pointing out errors in the textbook.
D7.zh: 他没有完成任何辅导课问题，然后花了20分钟指出教科书中的错误。

D6.en: When he was twelve, two schoolmates made a bet about his future.
D6.zh: 他十二岁时，两个同学对他的未来打了个赌。

D2.en: He spent very little time on math homework but still got full marks.
D2.zh: 他花很少时间做数学作业，但仍然得到满分。

D3.en: At 11-13, he shared a hero in Bertrand Russell, an intellectual giant and liberal activist.
D3.zh: 11到13岁时，他和朋友共同崇拜伯特兰·罗素，一位知识巨匠和自由活动家。

D16.en: At 18, he planned to lecture magnates on quantum theory, a theory he always promoted.
D16.zh: 18岁时，他计划给几位大人物讲量子理论，这是他一直宣扬的理论。

D1.en: At 13-14, he consoled himself with deeper and more difficult study.
D1.zh: 13到14岁时，他用更深入、更困难的学习来安慰自己。

D13b.en: As a child, he plunged into cold water every morning with never-questioned discipline.
D13b.zh: 他小时候每天早晨毫不犹豫地跳进冷水里。

D13a.en: At 3, he complied, dried his tears, and fussed no longer.
D13a.zh: 3岁时，他顺从了，擦干眼泪，不再吵闹。

D18.en: At 14, after haggling, his weekly allowance sufficed to buy a treasure.
D18.zh: 14岁时，经过讨价还价，他的每周零花钱足够买下这件宝贝。

M1.en: At 17, he won the competition and was first among applicants.
M1.zh: 17岁时，他赢得了比赛，并在申请者中排名第一。

D9.en: At 17, he received his diploma from the liceo, skipping the third year.
D9.zh: 17岁时，他跳过了第三年，从中学毕业。

D7.en: At 16, he recognized the soundness of a plan and decided to follow it despite knowing his parents would oppose it.
D7.zh: 16岁时，他认可了一个计划的合理性，并决定执行，尽管知道父母会反对。

D6.en: At 14, he gained a companion, another boy named Enrico Persico, for his expeditions.
D6.zh: 14岁时，他有了一个同伴，另一个叫Enrico Persico的男孩，一起探险。

D1.en: Not a natural skier, he trained himself to ski excellently over difficult terrain.
D1.zh: 他并非天生滑雪好手，但通过训练能在困难地形上出色滑雪。

D14.en: At 11, he recited to the prince during the convocation.
D14.zh: 11岁时，他在典礼上向王子背诵。

M1.en: At 17, he committed himself to the family goal of gaining social standing through academic achievement.
M1.zh: 17岁时，他致力于通过学业成就获得社会地位的家庭目标。

D4.en: At 16-18, he immersed himself in the harmonies of physics and music.
D4.zh: 16到18岁时，他沉浸在物理和音乐的美妙和谐中。

D9.en: As a teenager, he participated in chamber music and musical interludes at school ceremonies.
D9.zh: 十几岁时，他参加学校典礼的室内乐和音乐插曲表演。

D13b.en: Under pressure from authorities, he stayed with his unit for several weeks after school reopened.
D13b.zh: 在当局压力下，他在学校复课后仍留在部队数周。

D15.en: At 16-17, he worked from 6:00 AM until past sundown, sometimes as late as 10:00 PM.
D15.zh: 16到17岁时，他从早上6点工作到日落之后，有时甚至到晚上10点。

D3.en: At 18, he read Schrödinger's What Is Life?.
D3.zh: 18岁时，他读了薛定谔的《生命是什么》。

M2.en: At 17, he had a well-developed taste for good living, unlikely to be gratified as a Hungarian lecturer.
M2.zh: 17岁时，他已有对优渥生活的品味，这不太可能通过做匈牙利数学讲师来满足。

D20.en: At 17, he enrolled at Budapest University as a candidate for an advanced doctoral degree in mathematics.
D20.zh: 17岁时，他进入布达佩斯大学攻读数学高级博士学位。

M4.en: At 15, the 1919 Budapest commune brought home to him that communism does not work.
M4.zh: 15岁时，1919年布达佩斯公社让他认识到共产主义行不通。

D16.en: At 12-13, he provided a proof of a theorem using only subsidiary theorems Wigner knew.
D16.zh: 12到13岁时，他仅用维格纳已知的辅助定理就给出了一个定理的证明。

D1.en: At 10-15, when he lost to his father, he would be most unhappy.
D1.zh: 10到15岁时，他输给父亲后会非常不开心。

D13b.en: At 17, it was decided that he should be educated for a career in chemical engineering.
D13b.zh: 17岁时，家人决定让他接受化学工程教育。

D13a.en: He worked towards a degree and a doctorate in two different subjects at the same time.
D13a.zh: 他同时攻读两个不同专业的学士和博士学位。

D18.en: As a schoolboy, he admired his father and was attracted to acquiring great riches.
D18.zh: 学生时代，他崇拜父亲，被获取巨大财富所吸引。

D11.en: He invented and played complex war games with his family.
D11.zh: 他发明了复杂的战争游戏，并和家人一起玩。

M1.en: At 17, he sat for and won the Eotvos Prize exam.
M1.zh: 17岁时，他参加并赢得了Eotvos奖考试。

D9.en: At 15, his opinion was asked about dealing with less reliable classmates.
D9.zh: 15岁时，他被问及如何处理不太可靠的同学。

D7.en: His father decided biology was not for him, against his wishes.
D7.zh: 他父亲违背他的意愿，认为他不适合学生物。

D6.en: He wore a mock German uniform with Mike and a cousin during WWI.
D6.zh: 他穿着仿德国军服，和Mike及一个表兄弟一起。

D2.en: As a teenager, he systematically read a fifty-volume world history from start to finish.
D2.zh: 十几岁时，他系统地从头到尾读完了五十卷世界史。

D5.en: At 14, he walked to school through them.
D5.zh: 14岁时，他步行穿过它们去上学。

D16.en: At 16-18, he gave a talk on how Bohr theory and quantum mechanics explain the periodic table.
D16.zh: 16到18岁时，他做了一次关于玻尔理论和量子力学如何解释元素周期表的演讲。

M1.en: At 14, he won a scholarship from Northampton Grammar School to attend Mill Hill boarding school.
M1.zh: 14岁时，他获得北安普顿文法学校的奖学金，进入米尔希尔寄宿学校。

D15.en: As a teenager, he played on the school tennis team.
D15.zh: 十几岁时，他是学校网球队的成员。

D4.en: At 10-12, he learned glass blowing from Walter and did dangerous chemistry experiments in a shed.
D4.zh: 10到12岁时，他跟Walter学吹玻璃，并在花园棚屋里做危险的化学实验。

D7.en: He suddenly refused to go to church at about age 12, upsetting his mother.
D7.zh: 他大约12岁时突然拒绝去教堂，让母亲有些难过。

M3.en: He thought about how like he was to Chris and wondered if he was left to do what Chris was called away from.
M3.zh: 他常想自己和Chris有多像，怀疑自己是否被留下来做Chris未竟之事。

M6.en: At 18, he wondered if he was left to do something that another had been called away from.
M6.zh: 18岁时，他怀疑自己是否被留下来做另一个人被叫走去做的事。

D10.en: He was glad the stars shone on Saturday morning as a tribute to Chris.
D10.zh: 他高兴周六早晨星星闪耀，仿佛向Chris致敬。

D18.en: He found a ring and was rewarded with two shillings.
D18.zh: 他找到一枚戒指，得到了两先令的奖励。

M1.en: At 16, he passed with credits in English, French, math, physics, chemistry, and Latin.
M1.zh: 16岁时，他通过了英语、法语、初等数学、附加数学、物理、化学和拉丁语的考试，并获得学分。

D15.en: As a small child, he walks on the windswept promenade and picnics on the stony beach.
D15.zh: 幼年时，他在海风吹拂的步道上散步，在多石的海滩上野餐。

D4.en: At age 3, he experimented by planting his broken toy sailors in the ground, hoping they would grow.
D4.zh: 3岁时，他做实验，把坏掉的玩具水手种在地里，希望它们能重新长出来。

D9.en: At 12, he said, 'I managed to get enough people so we are having it.'
D9.zh: 12岁时，他说：“我设法找到了足够的人，所以我们正在举办它。”

D6.en: At 16, he met Christopher Morcom, his closest friend at Sherborne, also gifted in sciences.
D6.zh: 16岁时，他遇到了Christopher Morcom，他在Sherborne最亲密的朋友，同样在科学方面天赋异禀。

D2.en: At 16, he had wonderful concentration and would become absorbed in some abstruse problem.
D2.zh: 16岁时，他注意力非常集中，会沉浸在一些深奥的问题中。

D3.en: At age 12, he asked, 'Can you send me the chemical name or formula of cooking soda?'
D3.zh: 12岁时，他问：“你能把食用苏打的化学名称或分子式寄给我吗？”

D17.en: He saw Victor ill, learned Victor was caned, and never caned him despite his frequent trouble.
D17.zh: 他看到Victor生病，得知Victor被鞭打，从此再未体罚过他。

D19.en: He recorded his loves in a code in his Ephemeridae.
D19.zh: 他在《蜉蝣集》中用密码记录了他的恋情。

D17.en: As a boy, he reluctantly looked after little Felicie at gatherings.
D17.zh: 他小时候在聚会上不情愿地照顾小Felicie。

D10.en: He often had a temper and tantrums as a child.
D10.zh: 他小时候经常发脾气，哭闹很常见。

D14.en: He went to the theater often, sometimes more than once a week, and kept annotated records.
D14.zh: 他经常去剧院，有时一周不止一次，并保留带注释的记录。

D11.en: Before he could read or write, he dictated daily events to Minnie.
D11.zh: 在他会读写之前，他向Minnie口述日常事件。

D7.en: He learned his negative attitude from his father and reinforced it through reading and experience.
D7.zh: 他从父亲那里学到了消极态度，并通过阅读和经历强化了它。

D6.en: He entered the university together with Tonio Relia in fall 1906.
D6.zh: 1906年秋天，他和Tonio Relia一起进入大学。

D3.en: He read extensively in fields foreign to most physicists.
D3.zh: 他广泛阅读了大多数物理学家不熟悉的领域。

D12.en: He had two small rooms of his own overlooking the courtyard.
D12.zh: 他拥有两间自己的小房间，俯瞰庭院。

D15.en: He learned to ride a bicycle in England and practiced it all his life.
D15.zh: 他在英国学会了骑自行车，并终身练习。

D10.en: He was so mortified that he hid his papers in the roof of his house.
D10.zh: 他非常羞愧，把记录结果的论文藏在了自家屋顶。

D1.en: He attended Government College in Kumbakonam, with grades 45–47, 49, 51, 53, 54, 90, 101.
D1.zh: 他在库姆巴科纳姆的政府学院就读，成绩为45–47、49、51、53、54、90、101。

D14.en: At a 1904 ceremony, he was awarded the K. Ranganatha Rao prize for mathematics, and the headmaster praised him.
D14.zh: 在1904年的仪式上，他获得了K. Ranganatha Rao数学奖，校长称赞了他。

D13b.en: Each year during Sravanam, he renewed his vow at the Uppiliapan temple with other Brahmins.
D13b.zh: 每年Sravanam期间，他与其他婆罗门在Uppiliapan寺庙更新誓言。

D13a.en: In August 1905, he ran away from home.
D13a.zh: 1905年8月，他离家出走了。

D11.en: At 16, he charged into a dense mathematical thicket of five thousand theorems, largely fashioning his own path.
D11.zh: 16岁时，他冲进一个包含五千条定理的数学密林，很大程度上自己开辟道路。

D4.en: At 17, he lost interest in everything else and was all math, unable to get enough of it.
D4.zh: 17岁时，他不再对其他任何事感兴趣，满脑子都是数学，怎么也学不够。

D9.en: At 9, he scored high on this examination.
D9.zh: 9岁时，他这次考试得了高分。

D7.en: At 8, in 1895, after an unhappy six months in Madras, he was back in Kumbakonam.
D7.zh: 8岁时，1895年，在马德拉斯度过了不愉快的六个月后，他回到了库姆巴科纳姆。

D6.en: He was teased, carried on shoulders, and told stories by his older brother.
D6.zh: 他被哥哥逗弄、扛在肩上、听故事。

D3.en: At 15-16, in 1903, it first came into his hands a few months before he left Town High School.
D3.zh: 15到16岁时，1903年，在他离开镇高中前几个月，他第一次得到了它。

D12.en: As a small child, on his eleventh day of life, he was formally named according to tradition.
D12.zh: 幼年时，在他出生第十一天，按照传统他被正式命名。

D5.en: At 17, in 1904, he set out without informing anyone.
D5.zh: 17岁时，1904年，他没告诉任何人就出发了。

D8.en: As a child, she stared down a peer and walked home without a word.
D8.zh: 小时候，她盯着对方看，一言不发转身直接回家。

M7.en: In high school, she decided to accept consequences for an activity that gave her great pleasure, to keep her sanity.
M7.zh: 高中时，她决定为了能带来巨大快乐的活动承担后果，以此保持理智。

D20.en: At 17, she was elected president of the women's freshman class.
D20.zh: 17岁时，她被选为女子新生班主席。

D1.en: She spent two years beginning to understand what a statement meant.
D1.zh: 她花了两年时间才开始理解一个说法的含义。

D13a.en: At 17, she overrode parental opposition and went to Cornell University.
D13a.zh: 17岁时，她不顾父母反对，去了康奈尔大学。

D18.en: At 16, she worked at an employment agency interviewing people for jobs.
D18.zh: 16岁时，她在职业介绍所工作，面试求职者。

D5.en: At 17, she took up smoking and bobbed her hair.
D5.zh: 17岁时，她开始抽烟并剪了短发。

M1.en: In high school, she solved problems in unexpected ways, then asked to find the standard answer, feeling tremendous joy.
M1.zh: 高中时，她用非预期的方式解题，然后请求找出标准答案，感到极大的快乐。

D15.en: As a small child, she was allowed to skip school to go ice skating.
D15.zh: 幼年时，她被允许逃学去滑冰。

D4.en: She covered a tassel with a brown paper bag and pinched it with a paper clip.
D4.zh: 她用牛皮纸袋套住玉米穗，用回形针夹住底部。

D7.en: At age 6-10, a neighbor told her to be more ladylike, and her mother telephoned the neighbor to scold her.
D7.zh: 6到10岁时，邻居让她更淑女些，她妈妈打电话骂了那邻居。

D2.en: At Erasmus Hall high school, she revealed a passion for learning.
D2.zh: 在伊拉斯谟霍尔高中，她展现出对学习的热情。

D12.en: At about age three, she was sent to live with an aunt and uncle in Massachusetts.
D12.zh: 大约三岁时，她被送到马萨诸塞州与姨妈姨父同住。

D18.en: Between ages 5 and 10, he made pocket money by collecting plover's eggs for a grocer.
D18.zh: 5到10岁间，他靠捡鸻鸟蛋卖给杂货商赚零花钱。

D15.en: Between ages 5 and 10, he walked to school in all weathers.
D15.zh: 5到10岁间，他无论什么天气都走路去上学。

D7.en: At 16, he wore a bow-tie and never wore any other sort for the rest of his life.
D7.zh: 16岁时，他戴上领结，此后一生只戴这种领结。

D6.en: As a small child, he attended combined Halloween and Christmas parties with other families.
D6.zh: 幼年时，他和其他家庭一起参加万圣节和圣诞派对。

D3.en: As a boy, he observed plovers and collected their eggs for pocket money.
D3.zh: 他小时候观察鸻鸟，捡鸻鸟蛋赚零花钱。

D12.en: At age 10-12, he walked four miles to school and four miles back, in darkness during winter.
D12.zh: 10到12岁时，他每天步行四英里上学，再走四英里回家，冬天早晚摸黑赶路。

D2.en: At 14, he moved up four classes in his first two weeks.
D2.zh: 14岁时，他在头两周内连升四级。

D14.en: He drew a pastel portrait of his mother at age 13.
D14.zh: 他13岁时用粉彩画了一幅母亲的肖像。

D13a.en: At 15-16, his father agreed to let him go to Paris because he would not be alone.
D13a.zh: 15到16岁时，他父亲同意他去巴黎，因为他不会独自一人。

D11.en: He executed his first pastels.
D11.zh: 他画了第一幅粉彩画。

M1.en: He ranked second in his class twice and first in physics once.
M1.zh: 他两次在班上排名第二，一次物理第一。

D7.en: He bristled at wearing a military uniform and obeying the drum roll.
D7.zh: 他对穿军装和服从鼓点感到反感。

D6.en: He was inseparable from a friend who could bring him out of his silence.
D6.zh: 他和一个能让他走出沉默的朋友形影不离。

D2.en: At 16-17, he became a student in the final class of the collège royal of Besançon.
D2.zh: 16到17岁时，他进入贝桑松皇家中学的毕业班学习。

D3.en: He entered primary school in Arbois.
D3.zh: 他进入阿布瓦的小学。

D12.en: As a child, he helped with the harvest and joined in the festivities.
D12.zh: 他小时候帮忙收割，还参加了庆祝活动。

D8.en: He tricked freshmen out of nickels and recorded it in a black book.
D8.zh: 他骗新生五分钱，记在黑本子里。

D16.en: He immediately said x=5 and explained he found it by taking the product of the 2's.
D16.zh: 他立刻说x=5，并解释他是通过取2的乘积找到的。

D10.en: He said girls scared him and the whole business of getting past them scared him.
D10.zh: 他说女孩吓到他，整个接近她们的过程都让他害怕。

D1.en: He and his friend thought they solved trisecting an angle but misunderstood the problem.
D1.zh: 他和朋友以为找到了三等分角的方法，但误解了问题。

D14.en: He was just showing off to others.
D14.zh: 他只是在向别人炫耀。

D13a.en: He changed to electrical engineering, then changed again to physics.
D13a.zh: 他转到了电气工程，然后又转到了物理。

D18.en: At age 10-11, he repaired neighborhood radios to earn money for his lab.
D18.zh: 10到11岁时，他修理邻居的收音机赚钱买实验室用品。

D11.en: As a child, he used his imagination to rationally understand miracle accounts.
D11.zh: 小时候，他用想象力去理性理解各种奇迹的描述。

M1.en: At 13-14, after suffering a semester, he told the teacher he knew all the material.
M1.zh: 13到14岁时，忍受了一学期后，他告诉老师他全都懂了。

D15.en: He often swam.
D15.zh: 他经常游泳。

D4.en: As a child, he made adding machines and automatic pistols from wood.
D4.zh: 小时候，他用木头制作了加法机和自动手枪。

D6.en: At 18, he sent a copy of his theme to his friend Elmer Heller at Purdue.
D6.zh: 18岁时，他把自己的文章副本寄给了在普渡大学的朋友Elmer Heller。

D3.en: At 18, he developed ideas on the limits of scientific methods and wrote a theme.
D3.zh: 18岁时，他发展了关于科学方法局限性的想法，并写了一篇文章。

D12.en: At age 12-14, Feynman's family moved to a small apartment during the Depression.
D12.zh: 12到14岁间，费曼家因经济萧条搬进小公寓。

D5.en: At 17, he fought fiercely against several men trying to tie him up.
D5.zh: 17岁时，他拼命反抗几个试图绑住他的人。

D7.en: At 15-17, he saw a horribly rude boy ostentatiously kissing in the corner.
D7.zh: 15到17岁时，他看到一个非常粗鲁的男孩在角落里公然接吻。

D10.en: He stormed downstairs to Mina and told her no child of his should ever have this luxury.
D10.zh: 他冲下楼对米娜说，他的孩子绝不该享受这种奢侈。

D1.en: At 15, he forced himself to group several words at once for greater efficiency.
D1.zh: 15岁时，他强迫自己一次看几个词以提高效率。

D13a.en: At 7, he heard the teacher call him addled, cried, and went home to tell his mother.
D13a.zh: 7岁时，他听到老师说他脑子有问题，哭着回家告诉妈妈。

D18.en: At 15, he launched the weekly Grand Trunk Herald for eight cents a month.
D18.zh: 15岁时，他创办了周报《大干线先驱报》，订阅价每月8分。

D5.en: At 16, he narrowly avoided a collision with another train.
D5.zh: 16岁时，他险些与另一列火车相撞。

D11.en: At 15, he expanded into newspaper publishing using a secondhand press in a train baggage car.
D11.zh: 15岁时，他用二手印刷机在火车行李车厢里办起了报纸。

D4.en: At 15, he taught himself Morse code and built a rudimentary telegraph key.
D4.zh: 15岁时，他自学了摩尔斯电码并制作了一个简陋的电报键。

D6.en: At 17, he joined co-workers to form the local chapter of the National Telegraphic Union.
D6.zh: 17岁时，他和同事一起成立了全国电报工会的地方分会。

D2.en: From age 7 onward, he became a voracious, life-long reader.
D2.zh: 从7岁起，他成为一个如饥似渴、终身阅读的人。

D12.en: As a small child, he suffered a bout of scarlet fever soon after the family's arrival in Port Huron.
D12.zh: 幼年时，他在全家搬到休伦港后不久患上了猩红热。

D19.en: At 18, she boasted of her small economies, like buying second-hand items and choosing a cheaper membership.
D19.zh: 18岁时，她炫耀自己的小节约，比如买二手货和选更便宜的会员。

M3.en: At 15, she admired Dorothy Hodgkin.
M3.zh: 15岁时，她崇拜Dorothy Hodgkin。

M6.en: As a child, she felt a deep sense of vocation.
M6.zh: 她幼年时就有强烈的使命感。

D17.en: At 18, she willingly went to Buckinghamshire to assist her family.
D17.zh: 18岁时，她自愿去白金汉郡帮忙家人。

M4.en: At 17, she witnessed her parents' total unanimity in refugee relief work.
M4.zh: 17岁时，她目睹父母在难民救济工作中完全一致。

D16.en: At 18, she participated in a debate at school.
D16.zh: 18岁时，她参加了学校的辩论。

D14.en: At 18, she groaned at having to perform in a fresher's play when she wanted to hear talks at the Cambridge Union.
D14.zh: 18岁时，她因不得不在新生剧中表演而抱怨，因为她本想去剑桥联合会听演讲。

D13b.en: At age nine, she was sent to Lindores boarding school in Sussex.
D13b.zh: 9岁时，她被送到苏塞克斯的Lindores寄宿学校。

D13a.en: At 15, she decided what to do with her life and carried it out without deflections.
D13a.zh: 15岁时，她决定了人生目标，并毫无偏离地实现了它。

M1.en: At 18, she got the highest marks in chemistry and won a school leaving exhibition and prize.
M1.zh: 18岁时，她化学成绩最高，获得了毕业展览和奖品。

D15.en: At 15, she walked on a glacier 4,600 feet up with a guide.
D15.zh: 15岁时，她随向导在4600英尺高的冰川上行走。

D7.en: At 18, she questioned why there wasn't more criticism.
D7.zh: 18岁时，她质疑为什么没有更多批评。

D6.en: She went on an expedition with a delightful French party and reveled in their company.
D6.zh: 她和一群愉快的法国人一起探险，非常享受他们的陪伴。

D3.en: She intended to read during the holidays to fix some French in her mind.
D3.zh: 她打算假期里读点书，巩固一下法语。

D12.en: She was born as the second child and first daughter of Ellis and Muriel Franklin.
D12.zh: 她出生，是埃利斯和穆丽尔·富兰克林的第二个孩子、第一个女儿。

D5.en: At about 13, she was ready to go to a tournament but her mother gave away her ticket, so she couldn't go.
D5.zh: 13岁左右，她穿戴整齐准备去比赛，但母亲把她的票送人了，她没能去成。

D4.en: She spent 100 francs on dress fabric, enough for a dress and several carpets.
D4.zh: 她花了100法郎买连衣裙布料，够做一条裙子和好几块地毯。

M2.en: At 18, he defied all pressures and insisted on having his own way.
M2.zh: 18岁时，他顶住所有压力，坚持按自己的方式行事。

D11.en: At 18, he wrote up his findings as a manuscript and gave it to Prof. Jones for comments.
D11.zh: 18岁时，他把发现写成手稿，交给琼斯教授征求意见。

D9.en: He sent his paper to Philosophical Magazine in London titled 'Unsymmetrical diffraction bands due to a rectangular aperture'.
D9.zh: 他把自己的论文寄给伦敦的《哲学杂志》，标题是“矩形孔径产生的不对称衍射带”。

D6.en: He became friendly with Mr Ramaswamy Sivan.
D6.zh: 他和Ramaswamy Sivan先生成了朋友。

D2.en: He measured T for distilled water and repeatedly obtained values between 75 and 77 dynes per cm.
D2.zh: 他测量了蒸馏水的T值，反复得到每厘米75到77达因的结果。

D3.en: He had an Ectara specially constructed for his use and performed many experiments with it.
D3.zh: 他让人专门为他做了一把Ectara，并用它做了许多实验。

M6.en: He rejected a supernatural explanation of the origin of life and needed to find a scientific one.
M6.zh: 他拒绝了关于生命起源的超自然解释，需要找到科学的解释。

D17.en: At age 4-5, another child took his apple and gave it to a man.
D17.zh: 4到5岁时，另一个孩子拿了他的苹果给了一个男人。

D16.en: In his senior year, he placed second in the American Legion oratorical contest.
D16.zh: 高四时，他在美国退伍军人协会演讲比赛中获得第二名。

D10.en: At age 18, he developed achalasia, a frightening ailment that constricts the esophagus.
D10.zh: 18岁时，他患上了贲门失弛缓症，一种导致食管收缩的可怕疾病。

D1.en: At the last minute, a faction blocked him from being valedictorian because of the Knights of Columbus essay.
D1.zh: 最后一刻，一个派系因哥伦布骑士团论文阻止他成为毕业生代表。

D14.en: He was working on a script about space travel for the student radio station WUCB.
D14.zh: 他正在为学生广播电台WUCB写一个关于太空旅行的剧本。

D13a.en: At 18, he obeyed his mother and visited a graduate student she recommended.
D13a.zh: 18岁时，他听从母亲的话，去拜访了她推荐的一位研究生。

D18.en: As a child, he managed to get into concerts, plays, and ballets via hook, crook, and subway.
D18.zh: 小时候，他通过各种办法和地铁混进音乐会、戏剧和芭蕾舞表演。

D5.en: He took Indiana University stationery and wrote Secretary of State Dean Acheson.
D5.zh: 他拿起印第安纳大学的信纸，给国务卿迪安·艾奇逊写信。

D11.en: At about age 16, he wrote a long essay on extraterrestrial life in a school notebook.
D11.zh: 大约16岁时，他在学校笔记本上写了一篇关于外星生命的长文。

D15.en: He strove to excel in urban street games like stickball, handball, and basketball.
D15.zh: 他努力在棍球、手球和篮球等城市街头游戏中表现出色。

D9.en: He founded an astronomy club with Tobias Owen.
D9.zh: 他和托拜厄斯·欧文一起创办了一个天文俱乐部。

D6.en: He was invited by a female friend named Sandra to dine at home with her family.
D6.zh: 他的一位女性朋友桑德拉邀请他去她家与家人共进晚餐。

D2.en: At 13-16, he threw himself into his lessons and played beautifully, according to family friends.
D2.zh: 13到16岁时，他全身心投入学习，据家人朋友说，他演奏得很优美。

D3.en: At 16, he wrote to RAND seeking literature but was turned down perfunctorily.
D3.zh: 16岁时，他写信给RAND索取文献，但被敷衍地拒绝了。

D4.en: He rushed to Muller's office, found him peering into a microscope, and explained his discovery.
D4.zh: 他冲到穆勒的办公室，发现穆勒正盯着显微镜，便解释了他的发现。

D7.en: He slammed his fist on the table and bellowed, "I tell you, Jesus Christ is extraterrestrial!"
D7.zh: 他一拳砸在桌子上，吼道：“我告诉你，耶稣基督是外星人！”

M4.en: At 17, he told fellow passengers about corrupt Qing officials and urged them to save China.
M4.zh: 17岁时，他向旅客讲述清政府官吏的贪婪，宣传中国必须改造政治。

D14.en: At 17, he jumped onto a temple altar and smashed a god statue's hand, revealing straw and clay inside.
D14.zh: 17岁时，他跳上供桌，击碎北极帝君神像的手指，露出里面的烂泥稻草。

D13a.en: At 17, he was sent back to China by his brother because he wanted to be baptized as a Christian.
D13a.zh: 17岁时，因欲受洗入基督教，他被哥哥孙眉责令回国。

D18.en: At 6, he went up the mountain with his sister to cut grass and collect firewood.
D18.zh: 6岁时，他和姐姐孙妙茜上山割草拾柴。

D5.en: At 13, he rode a wild horse without a saddle, fell off, and was knocked unconscious.
D5.zh: 13岁时，他骑上一匹无鞍烈马，摔下晕厥，被送医院。

D11.en: At 12, he practiced martial arts at home and told classmates he wanted to become a general to fight the Manchus.
D11.zh: 12岁时，他在家舞弄拳棒，对同学说想学好武艺当大将打满洲仔。

M1.en: At 16, he graduated second in English grammar and received a Chinese book prize from the king of Hawaii.
M1.zh: 16岁时，他毕业考得英文文法第二名，由夏威夷国王亲自颁发奖品。

D15.en: At 6, he sometimes went out to sea with his grandfather to collect oysters.
D15.zh: 6岁时，他有时随外祖父驾船出海取蚝。

D4.en: At 12, he made a kite from bamboo sticks and paper, and flew it into the sky.
D4.zh: 12岁时，他用竹扦和纸做成燕子风筝，放上云霄。

D9.en: At 17, he worked to improve local governance and criticized the Qing government's corruption to villagers.
D9.zh: 17岁时，他努力改良乡政，向村民抨击清政府之腐败。

D7.en: At 16-17, he tore down a Guan Yu portrait and argued that deities cannot cure illness.
D7.zh: 16到17岁时，他扯下关帝画像，对职工说关云长不能降福治病。

D6.en: At 14-16, he invited overseas Chinese schoolmates to his brother's store for Chinese New Year.
D6.zh: 14到16岁时，他邀请华侨学友到大哥商店共度新年。

D2.en: At 7-9, he quickly cut a load of grass and helped his sister finish hers after picking wild fruit.
D2.zh: 7到9岁时，他先摘野果，然后很快割足一担芒草，又帮姐姐割够。

D3.en: At 10, he wondered why China lacked laws like foreigners' and why an overseas Chinese's hard-earned money was unprotected.
D3.zh: 10岁时，他疑惑为什么中国没有洋人的法律，华侨挣的钱得不到保护。

M3.en: At 18, he wrote to Oberth and received an encouraging reply, fervently hoping to meet his idol.
M3.zh: 18岁时，他写信给Oberth并收到鼓舞人心的回信，热切希望见到偶像。

M6.en: In his 20s, his goal was creating technical systems to enable human space travel.
M6.zh: 20多岁时，他的目标是创造能让人类进入太空的技术系统。

D20.en: At 16, he persuaded his principal to buy a telescope and organized an observatory construction team.
D20.zh: 16岁时，他说服校长买了一台望远镜，并组织了一个天文台建设团队。

D16.en: At 17, he wrote a short piece that he felt had a certain arrogance.
D16.zh: 17岁时，他写了一篇他认为有点傲慢的短文。

D1.en: He never complained about obstacles or setbacks; he only invented new ways and solutions.
D1.zh: 他从不抱怨障碍或挫折，只会发明新的方法和解决方案。

D13b.en: At 13, he was confirmed into the Lutheran Church.
D13b.zh: 13岁时，他在路德教会接受了坚信礼。

D5.en: At 13-14, he started a fire in the woods during an experiment at Ettersburg.
D5.zh: 13到14岁时，他在Ettersburg做实验时在树林里引发了一场火灾。

D11.en: At 14-15, he composed three piano pieces.
D11.zh: 14到15岁时，他创作了三首钢琴曲。

D15.en: At 16, he became an enthusiastic lifelong sailor on Spiekeroog.
D15.zh: 16岁时，他在Spiekeroog成为了一名终身热爱的水手。

D4.en: At 18, he began a six-month practicum at a locomotive factory.
D4.zh: 18岁时，他在一家机车厂开始了为期六个月的实习。

D9.en: As a university student, he was part of an impoverished amateur rocket group in Berlin.
D9.zh: 大学期间，他是柏林一个贫困的业余火箭小组的成员。

D6.en: At 14, he eagerly shared his knowledge about rockets and spaceflight with schoolmates.
D6.zh: 14岁时，他热切地与同学分享他关于火箭和太空飞行的新知识。

D3.en: At 14, he made a diagram of Mercury's transit across the Sun on 10 November 1927.
D3.zh: 14岁时，他绘制了1927年11月10日水星凌日的示意图。

D12.en: At age 8, he moved to Berlin with his mother and brothers in fall 1920.
D12.zh: 8岁时随母亲和弟弟们于1920年秋搬到柏林

M8.en: He discovered a treasure trove of new knowledge and absorbed it greedily, like Alibaba.
M8.zh: 他像阿里巴巴发现了藏宝洞一样，贪婪地汲取新的知识。

M2.en: At 12, he sought a birthday inscription for his grandfather to honor him and bring glory to the family.
M2.zh: 12岁时，他请求先生为祖父写寿文，以光耀家族。

D10.en: At 6, he was made to kneel by his mother and was whipped over ten times on her lap.
D10.zh: 6岁时，他母亲命他跪下受考问，把他翻伏在膝前，力鞭十数。

D1.en: At 12, he passed the imperial exam at the county level and became a xiucai.
D1.zh: 12岁时，他考中了秀才。

D14.en: At 6-7, his teacher gave a couplet line and he responded with a matching line.
D14.zh: 六七岁时，塾师以“东篱客赏陶潜菊”命对，他应曰：“南国人思召伯棠。”

D13b.en: At 12, he left home alone to study in Guangzhou under a teacher.
D13b.zh: 12岁时，他独自一人离开家乡，到广州拜师求学。

D4.en: At 17, he bought Xu Jiyu's 'Yinghuan Zhilue' in Shanghai.
D4.zh: 17岁时，他在上海买了一本徐继畬编的《瀛寰志略》。

D9.en: At 18, he transferred to Changxing Academy, leaving Xuehaitang.
D9.zh: 18岁时，他脱离学海堂，转学入长兴学舍。

D7.en: He refuted old scholarship with a loud voice, demolishing it.
D7.zh: 他以大海潮音般的声音驳诘旧学，将其摧陷廓清。

D6.en: At 17, he passed the provincial exam; examiner Li Duanfen admired him.
D6.zh: 17岁中举，主考官李端棻酷爱他，称其国士无双。

D3.en: At 17, he bought 'Yinghuan Zhilue', learned world geography, then read many new books.
D3.zh: 17岁下第归上海，购《瀛寰志略》，知全球形势，又硬读江南制造局新书。

D12.en: As a small child, he studied classics with grandfather and mother, and slept with grandfather.
D12.zh: 幼年时，他在祖父和母亲膝下读四子书、《诗经》，夜睡祖父榻。

D18.en: At 18, he was hired as a tutor by Admiral Li Zhun to support his family.
D18.zh: 18岁时，他被李隼聘为家庭教师来养家糊口。

M1.en: At 18, he ranked first in the preliminary exam and third in the final, then was admitted first by prefect Gong Xinzhan.
M1.zh: 18岁时，他初试第一，终试第三，被知府龚心湛以第一录取。

D4.en: At 8, he learned calligraphy from his brother-in-law Yuan Yinbai, practicing large characters with suspended wrist.
D4.zh: 8岁时，他跟五姐夫袁尹白学书法，悬腕作大字。

D9.en: At 18, he co-founded the Qunyi Study Society in Guangzhou with Gu Yingfen and others to pursue practical learning.
D9.zh: 18岁时，他与古应芬等人在广州组织群益学社，讲求实学。

D6.en: At 18, he co-organized the Qunyi Study Society in Guangzhou with Gu Yingfen and others.
D6.zh: 18岁时，他与古应芬等人在广州组织群益学社。

D2.en: At 8-13, he practiced calligraphy every morning with his mother by his side, and his father taught him in the evening.
D2.zh: 8到13岁时，他每天早起在堂屋练写大字，母亲常在旁陪伴，傍晚父亲亲自为他授课。

D3.en: At 12, he most enjoyed reading Wang Yangming's 'Instructions for Practical Living'.
D3.zh: 12岁时，他最喜读王阳明《传习录》。

D12.en: At 13-14, he lost his mother and then his father, making his poor family even poorer.
D12.zh: 13到14岁时，他丧母又丧父，家庭更贫薄了。

M3.en: He met Chen Qimei in Tokyo, who became his revolutionary mentor.
M3.zh: 他在东京结识了陈其美，后来成为他的革命良师益友。

M4.en: He abandoned his studies to join the military, seeking action and service to his country.
M4.zh: 他投笔从戎，因为觉得需要实际行动和为国效力的机会。

D15.en: As a child, he often bathed in streams and sometimes forgot to return home.
D15.zh: 他小时候常常跳入溪水中洗澡，有时乐而忘返。

D6.en: His favorite game was playing war, always appointing himself commander-in-chief.
D6.zh: 他最喜欢的娱乐是玩打仗游戏，总是自己担任总司令。

D2.en: At 17-18, he rose early each day and stood rigidly on the balcony for half an hour, lips tight, arms crossed.
D2.zh: 17到18岁时，他每天早起，在卧室阳台笔直站立半小时，双唇紧闭，双臂抱胸。

D3.en: At 17, he studied under a man named Gu Qinglian, who ran a literature hall in Fenghua town.
D3.zh: 17岁时，他师从顾清廉，此人在奉化镇办了一家文学馆。

D4.en: At age 3, he once stuck chopsticks down his throat to see how deep they would go.
D4.zh: 3岁时，他曾将一双筷子插入喉咙，看能杵多深。

D17.en: At 11, she and three friends each saved 25 cents to buy gifts for poor children living by the railroad.
D17.zh: 11岁时，她和三个朋友每人省下两角五分钱，凑钱给铁路旁的穷孩子买礼物。

D16.en: As a teenager, she protested to Mrs. Ainsworth, 'But I like it!'
D16.zh: 十几岁时，她向安斯沃思太太抗议说：“我偏就喜欢！”

D10.en: At 5, she broke out in red hives, itchy and hot, and was sent home.
D10.zh: 5岁时，她身上爆出红色荨麻疹，又痒又烫，最后被送回家。

D1.en: At 5, she quickly counted to twenty and beyond, but playmates hid; her sister came back to comfort her.
D1.zh: 5岁时，她快快数完数，玩伴却全躲起来了，最后姐姐回头来找她安慰她。

D14.en: At 12-15, she wore heavy makeup; when teased, she replied, 'It's Chinese lacquer.'
D14.zh: 12到15岁时，她浓妆艳抹，被调侃时回答说：“是中国漆。”

D11.en: At 16, she hung a curved sword on her dorm wall, scaring a freshman.
D11.zh: 16岁时，她在宿舍墙上挂一把弯刀，吓坏一名大一学生。

D6.en: At 10, she insisted on going abroad with her sister despite her parents' objections.
D6.zh: 她10岁时坚持要和姐姐同行，不顾父母劝她过几年再去。

D12.en: At age 10-11, her sister Soong Ai-ling took on the heavy responsibility of caring for her.
D12.zh: 10到11岁时，姐姐宋霭龄承担起照顾她的重任。

D13b.en: At 18, he married a daughter of the Chenzhou Yu family.
D13b.zh: 18岁时，他与陈州于氏名门闺秀结婚。

D6.en: As a teenager, whenever he had money, he treated friends to drinks until it was gone.
D6.zh: 少年时，他有点钱就招呼朋友喝酒，顷刻花光。

D2.en: At 15-16, he had three tutors teaching poetry, calligraphy, and eight-legged essays, sleeping only 5-6 hours nightly.
D2.zh: 15到16岁时，他请了三位老师教诗词、书法和八股文，昼夜学习，每晚只睡五六个小时。

D12.en: As a small child, he was nursed by his aunt because his mother had insufficient milk.
D12.zh: 幼年时，因生母奶水不足，他由婶母哺乳。

D17.en: At age 6-7, she saw a chef kill a duck, ran away crying, and never ate duck again at that school.
D17.zh: 6到7岁时，她看到厨师宰鸭，跑开哭了起来，从此在学校再也不吃鸭子。

D11.en: At 18, she published 'The Influence of Foreign Students in China' in the Wesleyan literary magazine.
D11.zh: 18岁时，她在《威斯里安女子学院文学杂志》发表《留学生在中国的影响》一文。

D6.en: At 16, she entered the literature department of Wesleyan Female College in Macon, Georgia.
D6.zh: 16岁时，她考入乔治亚州梅肯市威斯里安女子学院文学系。

D3.en: At 15, she studied in the US and was influenced by democratic and freedom ideas.
D3.zh: 15岁时，她到美国求学，受到民主自由思想的洗礼。

D20.en: He sat on the same bench as Ulanhu as classmates at Sun Yat-sen University.
D20.zh: 他和乌兰夫是孙逸仙大学的同班同学，坐同一张凳子。

M4.en: He declared his father Chiang Kai-shek a traitor to the revolution and his enemy.
M4.zh: 他宣布蒋介石背叛革命，成为他的敌人。

D10.en: He felt depressed in the hospital because no Chinese visited him, only three Russian friends.
D10.zh: 他在病中觉得忧闷，因为只有三个俄国朋友来看他，没有中国人。

D14.en: He gave a speech in Russian to three thousand people.
D14.zh: 他用俄文对三千人发表演说。

D4.en: He was assigned as an apprentice at the Dinamo Electric Factory, experiencing Soviet labor life.
D4.zh: 他被分配到狄拿马电气厂当学徒，体验苏联劳工生活。

D9.en: He studied Russian hard, laying the foundation for his Russian language skills.
D9.zh: 他苦学俄语，为他的俄文打下基础。

D6.en: He discussed current events daily with Yevnof and became good friends while learning Russian.
D6.zh: 他每日与依物纳夫谈论时事，学习俄文，成了好朋友。

D2.en: At 9, he was forced to study Shuowen Jiezi, told to learn ten characters daily.
D2.zh: 9岁时，他被硬逼着读《说文解字》，被告知每天认十个字。

D3.en: At 15, he was assigned to give a report on 'The Development of Human Society' in social science class.
D3.zh: 15岁时，他被指定在社会科学课上作关于‘人类社会的发展’的报告。

D12.en: At 10, he suddenly lost his beloved grandmother.
D12.zh: 10岁时，他突然失去了慈爱的祖母。

D7.en: He was expelled by conservative school authorities for being rebellious.
D7.zh: 他被学校保守派开除，被认为有造反趋向。

D17.en: At 16, he called an old woman his godmother and worked for her to repay a meal.
D17.zh: 16岁时，他认孙老太太为干妈，给她放猪扫院子报恩。

D1.en: At 16, he fell ill and was abandoned in a ditch, then rescued by an old man.
D1.zh: 16岁时，他生病被扔到路边沟里，被樊老汉救回家。

D5.en: At 14, he grabbed money from a gambling table and ran, shouting that the wind blew it away.
D5.zh: 14岁时，他把牌桌上的钱搂走就跑，喊风把钱吹跑了。

D4.en: At 17, he started practicing veterinary medicine and cured a horse on his first try.
D4.zh: 17岁时，他开始行医，第一次就治好了一匹马。

D7.en: At 14, he refused to work, talked back, and fought back when beaten by his master.
D7.zh: 14岁时，他顶嘴不干活，师傅打他他就还手。

D6.en: At 16, he judged a stranger as important and helped him with his cart and tea.
D6.zh: 16岁时，他判断此人非同寻常，殷勤地帮他套车端茶。

D12.en: At 16, he arrived in a strange place with no relatives and did odd jobs to survive.
D12.zh: 16岁时，他初到异地举目无亲，靠干零活打短工维持生计。

D19.en: He and a friend each kept a small notebook to record novels they read, comparing who read more.
D19.zh: 他和朋友各有一个小手折，记下看过的小说，互相比较谁读得多。

M6.en: His mother paid high tuition fees to ensure he could study, starting with six dollars and increasing yearly.
M6.zh: 他母亲渴望他读书，学金第一年就送六块钱，以后每年增加。

D16.en: At 14, he gave a speech titled 'On Human Nature' at a student self-government meeting.
D16.zh: 14岁时，他在自治会演说，题目是《论性》。

D10.en: At 13, he kept shouting while relying on a crowd, and his mother dragged him into a room.
D10.zh: 13岁时，他仗着人多嘴里乱喊，母亲把他拖进房里。

D14.en: At 15, he published a popular geography article in the first issue, signed 'Qishengsheng'.
D14.zh: 15岁时，他在第一期发表了一篇通俗地理学，署名“期自胜生”。

D13a.en: At 17, he firmly stopped his arranged marriage, citing the need to study, but actually knowing the family had no money.
D13a.zh: 17岁时，他斩钉截铁阻止了婚事，名义上是求学要紧，其实知道家中无余钱。

D11.en: At 8-9, he found a swallow's nest box and built a model temple with an inner hall, altar, and offerings.
D11.zh: 八九岁时，他找到一只燕窝匣子，做成圣庙大庭，又用午时茶匣子做内堂，设了祭桌神位。

M1.en: He was told in a will to study hard and improve.
M1.zh: 遗嘱教他努力读书上进。

D4.en: At around 10, he found a swallow's nest box and made a temple hall from it.
D4.zh: 大约10岁时，他找到一只燕窝匣子，用它做了圣庙大庭。

D9.en: At 17, he was among the students who signed to strike and held a rally on the playground.
D9.zh: 17岁时，他参与学生签名停课并在操场开大会。

D2.en: He practiced math problems in bed by candlelight after lights out.
D2.zh: 熄灯后他起来演习算学，把蜡烛放在床架上，伏在被窝里做题。

D3.en: At 11, he reread some sentences and suddenly jumped with joy, feeling no longer afraid.
D3.zh: 11岁时，他重读了几句话，忽然高兴得跳起来，觉得都不怕了。

D12.en: He realized he needed to send money to support his mother.
D12.zh: 他想到家中还有母亲，需要他寄钱赡养。

D1.en: His night in jail spurred his shame and drove him to study hard and pass the Boxer Indemnity exam.
D1.zh: 他那一夜的牢狱经验刺激了他的羞耻心，使他发愤读书考取了庚款留美。

D7.en: His night in jail spurred him to study hard and pass the Boxer Indemnity exam.
D7.zh: 那一夜的牢狱经历刺激了他的羞耻心，使他发愤读书考取了庚款留美。

M4.en: At 18, he felt deeply that the times were worsening and unbearable.
M4.zh: 痛感时势日非，不堪设想

D10.en: At age 6-9, he never cried no matter how severely he was beaten.
D10.zh: 6到9岁时，他无论挨了如何毒打，总一声不哭。

D14.en: At 17, he filled an essay with random obscure characters from Wenxuan and Kangxi Dictionary.
D14.zh: 17岁时，他把《文选》和《康熙字典》里的生僻字胡乱填进一篇大文。

D13b.en: At 18, on his wedding day, many relatives from the Chen family came.
D13b.zh: 婚礼那天，陈家剖屋的亲族、本家来了不少人。

D5.en: At 18, he first left home to take the provincial exam in Nanjing.
D5.zh: 18岁时，他初次出门到南京参加乡试。

D11.en: At age 6-7, he and friends shouted 'Fire! Fire!' around a sleeping guard.
D11.zh: 6到7岁时，他和一群小朋友在屋前屋后一起喊“失火！失火！”

M1.en: At 17, he was surprised that his poor essay won first place in the exam.
M1.zh: 17岁时，他那篇不通的文章竟被大宗师取了第一名。

D9.en: At 17, he interacted with reformists like Wang Xiyan and promoted Kang-Liang ideas.
D9.zh: 17岁时，他与汪希颜、汪孟邹等维新派人士交往，宣传康梁主张。

D7.en: At 18, he was shocked by the disgraceful scene in the Qing exam hall.
D7.zh: 18岁时，他在科举考场见到有辱斯文的事，发了一呆。

D2.en: At 18, he studied diligently, thought deeply, and had a sharp mind.
D2.zh: 18岁时，他学习勤奋，多思善思，头脑敏捷。

D3.en: At 18, he read and reread the Shiwu Bao, fascinated by Liang Qichao's idea that reform is inevitable.
D3.zh: 18岁时，他把《时务报》读了又读，对梁启超的‘变亦变，不变亦变’很感兴趣。

D4.en: At 18, he wrote two papers on Yangtze River defense.
D4.zh: 18岁时，他撰写了《扬子江筹防刍议》和《扬子江形势论略》两篇论文。

D8.en: At 17, he argued with a history teacher, cursed classmates who agreed with the teacher, and even hit a classmate with a chair.
D8.zh: 17岁时，他和历史老师争辩，咒骂同意老师的同学，甚至用椅子打了一个同学。

M3.en: At 16, he worshipped Kang Youwei and Liang Qichao as heroes.
M3.zh: 16岁时，他崇拜康有为和梁启超。

M7.en: At 16-17, he felt depressed about China's future and realized it was everyone's duty to help save the country.
M7.zh: 十六七岁时，他读了后对国家前途感到沮丧，开始认识到人人有责救国。

D17.en: As a small child, he sympathized with a poor classmate and often shared his lunch.
D17.zh: 幼年时，他同情一个穷同学，常常把自己的饭分给他吃。

D14.en: At 17, he wrote a passionate article and posted it on the school wall, expressing his political views for the first time.
D14.zh: 17岁时，他写了一篇充满激情的文章贴在墙上，第一次发表政治见解。

D13a.en: At 14, he was arranged to marry Luo Shi but never lived with her.
D13a.zh: 14岁时，他被包办娶了罗氏，但从未和她同居。

D18.en: At 11, he canceled a pig deal after hearing the seller's hardship.
D18.zh: 11岁时，他因同情农民而退掉了买猪的买卖。

D5.en: At 18, he initiated and led the cutting of queues to break with the Qing.
D5.zh: 18岁时，他倡议并带头剪辫子，还强行剪了同学的辫子。

D11.en: As a child, he secretly read banned novels like Water Margin during class.
D11.zh: 幼年时，他常在课上偷读《水浒传》等禁书。

D15.en: At 17, he trained diligently in military drills and mastered basic courses.
D15.zh: 17岁时，他认真出操上课，很快掌握了基本训练课目。

D9.en: At 18, he led students in cutting queues, including forcing hesitant ones.
D9.zh: 18岁时，他带头剪辫子，并强行剪了犹豫同学的辫子。

D12.en: From age 6, he did chores and farm work; at 14-15, he worked full-time in the fields with hired laborers.
D12.zh: 从6岁起，他做家务和农活；14到15岁时，他整天和长工一起在地里干活。

D7.en: He opposed Wang Ming and was punished with various forms of exile.
D7.zh: 他反对王明，因此被流放。

M7.en: At 18, he gave a speech denouncing warlords and calling for national responsibility.
M7.zh: 18岁时，他发表演说痛斥军阀，呼吁“天下兴亡，匹夫有责”。

D17.en: At 12-15, he visited a sick janitor and gave him his last eight coppers for treatment.
D17.zh: 12到15岁时，他去看望病倒的老校工，把仅有的八个铜元给他治病。

D1.en: At 12, after being bullied, he befriended other weak kids and fought back together.
D1.zh: 12岁时，他被大同学欺负后，交朋友一起抵抗对打。

D14.en: At 16-17, he was chosen as a school representative for inter-school speech contests two years in a row, winning first place.
D14.zh: 16到17岁时，他连续两年被推为代表参加校际演说比赛，南开都获第一名。

D11.en: At 18, he wrote a poem responding to another's rhyme, lamenting the nation's sorrow.
D11.zh: 18岁时，他和了一首诗，感叹“茫茫大陆起风云”。

M1.en: At 12-15, he ranked first every semester.
M1.zh: 12到15岁时，他每学期都名列第一。

D15.en: At 12-15, he persisted in running, playing soccer, and doing exercises in the cold wind.
D15.zh: 12到15岁时，他坚持在凛冽寒风中跑步、踢球、做操。

D9.en: At 16, he co-founded a student society at Nankai School, drafting its charter.
D9.zh: 16岁时，他与同学发起组织南开学校敬业乐群会，并负责起草会章。

D7.en: At 13, he cut off his queue, becoming the first student at school to do so.
D7.zh: 13岁时，他剪掉辫子，成为全校第一个剪辫子的学生。

D6.en: At 17, he proposed moving to different dorms to connect with more classmates.
D6.zh: 17岁时，他提议分开住以团结更多同学。

D2.en: At 15, he studied English intensively every day to improve his weak foundation.
D2.zh: 15岁时，他每天刻苦学习英文以弥补基础薄弱。

D12.en: At 10-11, he began managing household finances and social obligations.
D12.zh: 10到11岁时，他开始当家，照管柴米油盐和外出应酬。

D11.en: He spent his free time with Hong Gengyang in the study, reading book after book.
D11.zh: 他一有时间就和洪赓扬结伴钻进书房，读了一本又一本。

D15.en: In his spare time, he practiced hitting a sandbag, and soon could hit a 30-40 kg bag.
D15.zh: 在课余时间，他练习击打沙袋，没过多久就能击打开三四十公斤重的沙袋了。

D4.en: At 9, he threw a black object at a dog; the dog caught it, rolled on the ground, and ran away.
D4.zh: 9岁时，他掏出一个黑乎乎的东西朝狗扔去，狗叼住后满地打滚，最后跑了。

D9.en: He joined classmates in launching a strike, parades, and speeches to protest.
D9.zh: 他同玉潭学校的同学们再次发动罢课，开展游行和向群众演讲等抗议活动。

D6.en: At 9, he often shared his good dishes with friends and ate the leftovers.
D6.zh: 9岁时，他经常把好菜分给小伙伴们吃，自己吃剩下的。

D2.en: At 9, he always finished the teacher's assigned lessons first and often ranked first in exams.
D2.zh: 9岁时，他总能第一个完成先生规定的功课，考试也常常是第一名。

D3.en: At 11-12, he began collecting books and frequently borrowed from classmate Zhou Zusan's home.
D3.zh: 11到12岁时，他开始网罗各种书籍，经常去同学周祖三家借书。

D12.en: At 5-6, he weeded and picked vegetables with siblings and herded cattle with peers.
D12.zh: 五六岁时，他和哥哥姐姐一起下地除草摘菜，和伙伴们上山放牛拾柴。

M4.en: At 11, he read articles in China Youth and learned about imperialism and feudalism, awakening his revolutionary consciousness.
M4.zh: 11岁时，他读《中国青年》上的文章，听讲帝国主义、封建主义，播下了阶级意识的种子。

D16.en: At 14, he gave stirring speeches to his classmates.
D16.zh: 14岁时，他在同学中作鼓动性演说。

D5.en: At 17, he noticed panicked pedestrians and learned that Nationalist troops were approaching, due to a Red Army scout's oversight.
D5.zh: 17岁时，他发现行人惊慌不安，一问才知道国民党部队正开过来，因红军尖刀班疏忽。

D11.en: At 15, he wrote a play titled 'Down with Chai Shanhu' for the propaganda team.
D11.zh: 15岁时，他动手为宣传队编了一个剧本，名叫《打倒柴山虎》。

D15.en: As a small child, he walked a hilly 20 km round trip daily for two years, totaling over 25,000 li.
D15.zh: 幼年时，他日复一日走崎岖路来回20公里，两年里程二万五千余里。

D4.en: At 15, he was among the Red Army forces that transferred to southern Jiangxi after the fall of Jinggangshan.
D4.zh: 15岁时，他在井冈山被攻破后随红军转移赣南。

D7.en: At 12, he wrote anti-Kuomintang slogans by day and led friends to post them at night.
D7.zh: 12岁时，他白天写反国民党标语，晚上带小伙伴张贴。

D6.en: At 14, he played drum in school band and captained the basketball team.
D6.zh: 14岁时，他参加校鼓乐队当鼓手，还担任篮球队队长。

D3.en: At 16, he curiously read Marx's pamphlet and learned about class struggle.
D3.zh: 16岁时，他好奇地翻看马克思的小册子，知道了阶级斗争规律。

D12.en: At 11-13, he daily walked 20 km with his father to carry coal.
D12.zh: 11到13岁时，他每天跟父亲走20公里路去挑煤。

D10.en: At 18, he burst into Gu Zuolin's room, sobbing, 'Secretary Gu, I am not an AB League member!'
D10.zh: 18岁时，他扑在顾作霖面前哭着说：顾书记，我不是“AB团”呀！

D3.en: At 13, he was elected by classmates to write an essay on Confucius worship, praised by his teacher.
D3.zh: 13岁时，他被同学推举写了一篇《上巳祀孔记》，受到老师褒奖。

D19.en: At 15, he planned his mother's daily chores to eliminate repetitive tasks.
D19.zh: 15岁时，他为母亲的日常劳动做了合理规划，废除了重复性劳动。

M7.en: At 15, he felt a strong sense of responsibility toward his country and nation.
M7.zh: 15岁时，他心中萌发了对国家、民族的强烈责任感。

M2.en: As a small child, he bore his parents' expectation to carry on ancestral legacy and glorify the family.
M2.zh: 幼年时，他背负着父母“承祖志、耀门庭”的期望。

D1.en: As a small child, he insisted on going to school in all weather, refusing his parents' advice to stay home.
D1.zh: 幼年时，他风雨无阻去上学，拒绝父母劝他留在家里的建议。

D13a.en: At 15, he was excited about his father's decision, as it matched his ideas of saving the country through science and industry.
D13a.zh: 15岁时，他对父亲的决定非常兴奋，因为这与他科学救国、工业救国的想法一致。

D18.en: At 6-11, he secretly gave five silver dollars to a classmate to treat his sister's illness.
D18.zh: 6到11岁时，他悄悄塞给同学五个银元，让他给妹妹治病。

D5.en: At 16, he boarded a steamer from Chongqing to Shanghai, the youngest of 84 Sichuan students heading to France.
D5.zh: 16岁时，他登上从重庆开往上海的汽船，是84个赴法四川学生中年龄最小的。

M1.en: At 11, he passed a competitive exam and entered Guang'an County Advanced Primary School as a boarder.
M1.zh: 11岁时，他通过竞争激烈的考试，进入广安县高级小学当寄宿生。

D4.en: At 16, he ran shouting, 'Hurry up! Let's go pick seashells, or we'll miss them when the tide comes in!'
D4.zh: 16岁时，他边跑边喊：“快点儿啊！捡贝壳去啰，海潮涨满了可就捡不着了！”

D9.en: At 15, he actively participated in protests and parades organized by the Guang'an Student Patriotic Association.
D9.zh: 15岁时，他积极参加广安学生爱国分会组织的游行和罢课。

D7.en: At 16, after one month, he quit his job at the Schneider factory due to humiliation.
D7.zh: 16岁时，一个月后，他因不堪屈辱辞去了施奈德工厂的工作。

D2.en: At 15-16, he passed the entrance exam and studied at a one-year preparatory school in Chongqing for studying abroad.
D2.zh: 15到16岁时，他通过入学考试，在重庆的预备学校学习了一年。

D3.en: At 16, while sailing to France, he was deeply impressed by the inequality between white masters and local laborers.
D3.zh: 16岁时，在赴法途中，他对白人与当地劳工的不平等关系留下了深刻印象。

D12.en: At 16-17, he worked as a waiter, porter, construction laborer, and even a cleaner.
D12.zh: 16到17岁时，他当过招待、搬运工、建筑工，还做过清洁工。

D14.en: At 14, he participated in a demonstration as part of the May Fourth Movement.
D14.zh: 14岁时，他参加了作为五四运动一部分的示威活动。

M7.en: At 16, Wang Ming urged compatriots to awaken and fight for survival.
M7.zh: 16岁时，王明呼吁同胞觉醒奋战图存。

D14.en: At 9, he independently helped villagers write Spring Festival couplets.
D14.zh: 9岁时，他就能独立帮乡亲们写春联了。

D11.en: At 15, he wrote a seven-character regulated verse titled 'Frost Cold First Heavy, Wild Geese Cross the Sky'.
D11.zh: 15岁时，他作了一首七律《霜寒初重雁横空》。

D7.en: At 10, he was beaten by the teacher and forced to kowtow, then ran home crying and refused school for over 20 days.
D7.zh: 10岁时，他被老师痛打并磕头，跑回家大哭大闹，20多天不上学。

D16.en: At 15, he matched a couplet couplet with Li Shaoshan.
D16.zh: 15岁时，他对上了李少山的对联。

M4.en: He became increasingly concerned about national decline, ethnic crisis, and the danger of people being enslaved.
M4.zh: 他越来越关心国家的衰落、民族面临的危机和人民沦为奴隶的危险。

D1.en: At age 13, after failing the child exam, he studied under Huang Baolin at a private school.
D1.zh: 13岁时，童试失利后，他投奔黄宝琳门下继续攻读四书五经。

D5.en: At 18, he decisively left Yongpingfu Middle School and entered Beiyang College of Law and Politics in Tianjin.
D5.zh: 18岁时，他毅然中断永平府中学堂的学习，赴天津考入北洋法政专门学堂。

D11.en: At 16, he said, 'When I grow up, I will emulate Hong Xiuquan.'
D11.zh: 16岁时，他说：“我长大就效法洪秀全。”

M1.en: At 16, he passed the child exam and entered Yongpingfu Middle School.
M1.zh: 16岁时，他再度参加童试，得以进入永平府中学堂读书。

D6.en: At 18, he and friends traveled from Tianjin to Changli and visited Xiwufeng Han Yu Temple.
D6.zh: 18岁时，他与二三友辈自津门归，游兴勃发，相率至西五峰韩昌黎祠一憩。

D2.en: At 16, he entered middle school, studied diligently, and excelled in exams.
D2.zh: 16岁时，他进入中学堂，勤奋学习，考试名列前茅。

D3.en: At 18, he studied Western science and the writings of Kang Youwei and Liang Qichao at Yongpingfu Middle School.
D3.zh: 18岁时，他在永平府中学堂读书，开始接触西方科学文化，研读康有为、梁启超的文章。

D13b.en: At age 10, he married Zhao Renlan from his village.
D13b.zh: 10岁时，他与本村赵纫兰结婚。

D13a.en: At age 11, he married Zhao Renlan, six years older, arranged by Li Ruzhen.
D13a.zh: 11岁时，在李如珍安排下，他与大六岁的赵纫兰结婚。

D12.en: At 10, he married Zhao Renlan, a village girl five years his senior.
D12.zh: 10岁时，他和本村姑娘赵纫兰结婚，她比他大五岁多。

M8.en: At age 5, he showed scary defiance aboard the Germania.
M8.zh: 5岁时，他在Germania号上表现出令人害怕的反抗。

D8.en: At 7, he said, 'If I didn’t give the orders, nothing would happen!'
D8.zh: 7岁时，他说：“如果我不发号施令，什么都不会发生！”

D19.en: As a child through young adult, he collected over a million stamps in 150 albums.
D19.zh: 幼年到青年时期，他收集了超过一百万张邮票，放在150本集邮册里。

M3.en: At 17, his admiration for Theodore Roosevelt turned to emulation.
M3.zh: 17岁时，他对西奥多·罗斯福的钦佩变成了效仿。

M2.en: At 18, he felt he was the only one who could fulfill his family's dreams.
M2.zh: 18岁时，他觉得只有他能实现家人的梦想。

D16.en: At 14-18, he won a Latin prize and was a star debater.
D16.zh: 14到18岁时，他获得了拉丁语奖，是学校的明星辩手。

D13b.en: At 14, he tried not to think about the fall and the boarding school he would have to attend.
D13b.zh: 14岁时，他努力不去想秋天和即将入读的寄宿学校。

D13a.en: At 16, he asked his mother not to arrange his future happiness.
D13a.zh: 16岁时，他请求母亲不要安排他未来的幸福。

M1.en: At 14, he stood fourth in a class of nineteen.
M1.zh: 14岁时，他在十九人的班级中排名第四。

D4.en: At 12, his gun accidentally discharged, pellets hitting the ground.
D4.zh: 12岁时，他的枪意外走火，弹丸打在地上。

D9.en: At 18, he won an athletic ribbon as baseball team manager at Groton.
D9.zh: 18岁时，他在格罗顿作为棒球队经理赢得了运动绶带。

D6.en: At 18, he lunched with Eleanor and Helen in New York.
D6.zh: 18岁时，他在纽约与埃莉诺和海伦共进午餐。

D3.en: He knew languages, had traveled to Europe eight times, and learned to read from his mother.
D3.zh: 他懂多门语言，去过欧洲八次，母亲教他读书。

D12.en: At 7, he was thrilled to be allowed to touch her stamps for the first time.
D12.zh: 7岁时，他第一次被允许碰她的邮票，兴奋得想大叫。

D8.en: At 16, she gradually gained the upper hand in her contest with Pei Minglun, despising his weakness.
D8.zh: 16岁时，她在与裴明伦的较量中渐渐占了上风，鄙视他的软弱。

D17.en: As a teenager, she helped a friend who was vomiting, cleaning up and caring for her.
D17.zh: 十几岁时，她扶着呕吐的朋友，拍背、漱口、照顾躺下，并清理了秽物。

D10.en: As a teenager, she wept while recounting her recent hardships.
D10.zh: 十几岁时，她边诉苦边流泪。

D13b.en: At 7, she was sent to a county primary school by her mother.
D13b.zh: 7岁时，她被母亲送入县立高等小学上学。

D18.en: At 17, she worked as a library clerk while studying part-time.
D18.zh: 17岁时，她任图书馆职员，半工半读。

D5.en: At 15, she climbed onto the Dacheng Hall at midnight to take the crown off the statue of Confucius.
D5.zh: 15岁时，她夜半走上大成殿，去摘回至圣先师头上的平天冠。
