M1.en: In 1995 at age 12, he won his first national junior boys' singles title and was very happy.
M1.zh: 1995年12岁时，他第一次拿到全国少儿比赛男单冠军，特别高兴。

D15.en: At age 7-8, he broke the 100-meter sprint record for fourth graders at his school sports meet.
D15.zh: 七八岁时，他在小学二年级的校运动会上打破了四年级的100米短跑纪录。

D9.en: In 1998 at age 15, he represented the Bayi team in a match in Chengdu, and a teammate joked with him at dinner.
D9.zh: 1998年15岁时，他代表八一队到成都打比赛，赛后饭桌上队友吴勇对他开玩笑。

D7.en: At age 6-9, he tried to sneak out while his father was asleep, but his father pretended to sleep and caught him.
D7.zh: 他6到9岁时趁父亲睡着偷偷溜出去，但父亲装睡，在他摸到门口时喊他回来。

D6.en: At 9, he missed home and wrote letters weekly to his family.
D6.zh: 9岁时他想家，每周都给家里写信。

D2.en: As a child, he warmed up in bed before getting up at 5am in winter.
D2.zh: 幼年时他冬天早上5点起床前先在被子裡蹬腿热身。

D12.en: At 9, he felt helpless after his mother left him in Fuzhou.
D12.zh: 9岁时妈妈把他丢在福州，他感到无助。

D11.en: At age 5, he imitated commentator Song Shixiong's tone, jumping and dancing on the sofa while watching a women's volleyball match.
D11.zh: 5岁时，他学着宋世雄老师的腔调，在沙发上手舞足蹈，又蹦又跳，电视里正播女排世界杯。

D4.en: At age 6-9, he often sneaked to a pharmacy's drying yard, running among herbs and mixing them up.
D4.zh: 他6到9岁时常偷跑去药店的晒场，在药材中间跑来跑去，把各种药材弄混。

M2.en: At 14, after her father's death, she resolved not to defy his dying wish.
M2.zh: 14岁时，爸爸离世后，她决定不违背他的遗愿。

D10.en: At 15, she sat watching the sky darken, tears silently falling.
D10.zh: 15岁时，她坐着看天空从蓝变黑，眼泪无声地掉下来。

D1.en: At 9, she skipped training for a month to study for exams, upsetting her coaches.
D1.zh: 9岁时，她为备考一个月没训练，老师和教练意见很大。

D13b.en: As a teenager, she played tennis because her team and country needed her.
D13b.zh: 十几岁时，她打球是因为队伍和国家需要她。

D13a.en: As a child, she followed her father's wish to become a professional tennis player.
D13a.zh: 小时候，她遵循爸爸的意愿成为专业网球运动员。

D18.en: At 14, she wanted to play more matches to earn prize money and pay off family debt.
D18.zh: 14岁时，她希望多打比赛赚奖金还清家里债务。

D5.en: At 15, she boldly approached Asian-looking strangers for help despite not knowing English.
D5.zh: 15岁时，她大胆向亚洲面孔的人求助，尽管不懂英语。

D11.en: At 15-16, when homesick, she wrote letters.
D11.zh: 15到16岁时，想家时她就写信。

M1.en: At 15, she won her first national championship in Qingdao, becoming the youngest adult singles champion.
M1.zh: 15岁时，她在青岛拿到第一个全国冠军，成为年龄最小的成人组单打冠军。

D4.en: At 8-10, she marked lines by rubbing with her feet and then pushed a cart to draw them with lime water.
D4.zh: 8到10岁时，她用脚蹭出线的位置，再推着小车用石灰水画线。

D6.en: At 15, she shared a room with an outgoing American girl who talked to her in English every day.
D6.zh: 15岁时，她和一位外向的美国姑娘同屋，对方每天噼里啪啦对她说一大通英文。

D3.en: At 15-16, she focused on language and math in the morning, finding math easy and spending most effort on English.
D3.zh: 15到16岁时，她上午学语言和数学，数学不费吹灰之力，主要精力攻克语言关。

D12.en: At 14, after her father died, her mother consulted her on everything, including debts and funeral costs.
D12.zh: 14岁时，父亲去世后，妈妈凡事都和她商量，包括还债和丧事开销。

M3.en: At 15, he knew all about Paddock because Paddock was the first great sprinter to turn Olympic gold into fame.
M3.zh: 15岁时，他知道Paddock的一切，因为Paddock是第一个把奥运金牌变成名气的伟大短跑运动员。

D10.en: At 18, he said, 'I haven’t got the heart to see Mr. Riley. He must be terribly ashamed of me.'
D10.zh: 18岁时，他说：“我没脸见Riley先生。他一定对我感到非常羞愧。”

D1.en: Embarrassed, he could not face Riley for almost thirty minutes, then finally approached.
D1.zh: 他尴尬得几乎三十分钟不敢面对Riley，最后才走上前。

D18.en: He and his family packed belongings and boarded a train for Cleveland when he was 9.
D18.zh: 他9岁时和家人收拾行李坐火车去克利夫兰。

D4.en: At 14, he had morning track practice with Riley before school.
D4.zh: 14岁时，他每天早晨在上学前和Riley一起进行田径训练。

D9.en: At age 18, he was elected president of his student council at East Tech High.
D9.zh: 他18岁时被选为East Tech高中学生会主席。

D6.en: At 15, he passed notes to a girl in class and carried her books.
D6.zh: 15岁时，他上课给女生传纸条，还帮她拿书。

D3.en: At 14, he watched horses gallop effortlessly down the stretch.
D3.zh: 14岁时，他看着马儿轻松地跑过直道。

D12.en: At 18, he planned to help support his child.
D12.zh: 18岁时，他打算想办法养活自己的孩子。

M1.en: He ran 100 meters in 10.3 seconds at age 18, breaking the world record.
M1.zh: 他18岁时以10.3秒跑完100米，打破世界纪录。

M8.en: At about 18, he felt he might be missing something in his life when confronted with difficult questions.
M8.zh: 大约18岁时，他面对难题时感到自己可能错过了什么。

M3.en: As a child, he was inspired by Jesse Owens, a big figure in track and the Olympics.
M3.zh: 他小时候受到杰西欧文斯的激励，杰西是田径和奥运会的巨星。

D1.en: At age 11, he complained to his family that he was tired of losing and decided to keep trying.
D1.zh: 11岁时，他向家人抱怨自己厌倦了失败，决定继续努力。

D11.en: At age 11, he used his announcer voice to say, 'Here it is, folks, Carl Lewis is one jump away from the world record.'
D11.zh: 11岁时，他用播音腔说：‘各位，卡尔·刘易斯离世界纪录只差一跳。’

D15.en: At age 16, he was named anchor man on the relay team and became South Jersey champ in the 100.
D15.zh: 16岁时，他被任命为接力队最后一棒，并成为南泽西100米冠军。

D3.en: At 16-17, he read a book about Jesse Owens and gained more appreciation for his achievements.
D3.zh: 16到17岁时，他读了一本关于Jesse Owens的书，更加欣赏他的成就。

D18.en: At about 18, Adidas gave him five thousand dollars to wear their stuff exclusively.
D18.zh: 18岁左右，阿迪达斯给了他五千美元让他独家穿他们的装备。

D10.en: At 13, he developed a stammer and became reticent with strangers.
D10.zh: 13岁时，他患上了口吃，对陌生人变得沉默寡言。

D1.en: At 14-15, he was used only as a sparring partner for nine months, kept out of matches.
D1.zh: 14到15岁时，他被当作陪练九个月，不让参加比赛。

D14.en: At 15-16, he fought his first fight under an assumed name at a Moose Benefit and earned three dollars.
D14.zh: 15到16岁时，他用假名在麋鹿慈善赛上打了第一场比赛，赚了三美元。

D13b.en: As a small child, he attended church every Sunday because his mother insisted.
D13b.zh: 幼年时，他每周日都去教堂，因为母亲坚持。

D5.en: At 18, he entered his first formal bout, a stag event at the Edison Athletic Club.
D5.zh: 18岁时，他参加了第一场正式比赛，在爱迪生体育俱乐部的男士活动上。

D15.en: At 18, his body had hardened and grown through constant workouts.
D15.zh: 18岁时，他的身体通过持续锻炼变得结实强壮。

D4.en: At 13-14, he studied cabinet making at Bronson School, where boxing was part of the recreation program.
D4.zh: 13到14岁时，他在Bronson学校学习木工，那里的娱乐活动包括拳击。

D9.en: As a teenager, he hung out with the Catherine Street gang and had kid-style gang fights.
D9.zh: 十几岁时，他和凯瑟琳街的帮派混在一起，参与小孩式的帮派斗殴。

D2.en: As a child, he pounded the pavement so hard finding buyers for scalped tickets that his feet bled.
D2.zh: 幼年时，他为了卖黄牛票拼命跑路，脚都磨出血了。

D3.en: At age 5-9, he began boxing as a child.
D3.zh: 5到9岁间，他开始练习拳击。

D13a.en: At 13-14, he took only one or two violin lessons before finding a better use for the weekly dollar.
D13a.zh: 13到14岁时，他只上了一两次小提琴课，就找到了每周一美元的更好用途。

D6.en: As a teenager, he was jovial, very verbal, and witty around the house.
D6.zh: 十几岁时，他在家里很开朗，话多，而且相当幽默。

D15.en: At 17, he was a skinny kid with immense stamina who could run all over the field.
D15.zh: 17岁时，他瘦小但耐力惊人，能跑遍整个球场。

D4.en: As a small child, he played with anything round, like rolled-up papers tied with string.
D4.zh: 幼年时，他玩任何圆形的东西，比如用绳子捆起来的纸团。

D8.en: At 18, he told a boxer he wanted to teach him how to punch, but the boxer did it his own way.
D8.zh: 18岁时，他对一个拳击手说想教他出拳，但那人按自己的方式打。

M7.en: He always felt like he was born to do something for his people.
M7.zh: 他总觉得自己生来就是要为同胞做点什么。

M6.en: At 15, he had a sure sense of his own destiny.
M6.zh: 15岁时，他确信自己的命运。

M2.en: As a teenager, he found a father substitute in Elijah Muhammad.
M2.zh: 十几岁时，他在以利亚·穆罕默德身上找到了父亲替代者。

M4.en: At 17, he first heard about the group in Chicago during a Golden Gloves tournament.
M4.zh: 17岁时，他在芝加哥参加金手套锦标赛时第一次听说那个组织。

D10.en: At 16-17, he made someone faint.
D10.zh: 16到17岁时，他让一个人晕倒了。

D1.en: He was back working out with Moran again the next day.
D1.zh: 他第二天又回去和Moran一起训练了。

D14.en: At 18, he was delighted whenever recognized and congratulated in public.
D14.zh: 18岁时，每当在餐厅或街上被人认出和祝贺，他都很开心。

D13b.en: At 15, he entered Central High School in the 10th grade on September 4, 1957.
D13b.zh: 15岁时，他于1957年9月4日进入中央高中读十年级。

D13a.en: At 16, he voluntarily withdrew from Central High School.
D13a.zh: 16岁时，他自愿从中央高中退学。

D18.en: As a child, he helped his father paint signs on weekends or after school.
D18.zh: 小时候，他周末或放学后帮父亲画招牌。

D5.en: At 18, he bought a parachute at an army surplus store and wore it on the plane.
D5.zh: 18岁时，他在军需店买了一个降落伞，并在飞机上穿着它。

D11.en: As a teenager, he imbibed Muslim tales with fascination but a casual grasp of specifics.
D11.zh: 十几岁时，他着迷地吸收穆斯林故事，但对细节掌握得相当随意。

M1.en: At 18, he came back from a clumsy first round to win a unanimous decision and the gold medal.
M1.zh: 18岁时，他在笨拙的第一回合后反击，以一致判定赢得金牌。

D15.en: As a teenager, he ran through Chickasaw Park in steel-tipped clodhoppers and a sweat suit.
D15.zh: 十几岁时，他穿着钢头厚底鞋和运动服跑过奇克索公园。

D4.en: At 12, he and a friend rode their bicycles to the Columbia Auditorium.
D4.zh: 12岁时，他和一个朋友骑自行车去了哥伦比亚礼堂。

D7.en: As a teenager, he was in court for truancy, stealing, and running away.
D7.zh: 他十几岁时因逃学、偷窃和离家出走而上法庭。

D2.en: As a teenager, he was a nutrition nut and carried water with garlic in it.
D2.zh: 十几岁时，他是个营养狂，随身带着泡了大蒜的水。

D3.en: At 15, he asked question after question about training, fighters, and technique.
D3.zh: 15岁时，他不断问关于训练、其他拳手和技术的问题。

D6.en: At 18, he developed a crush on Rudolph, but she was engaged to a fellow sprinter.
D6.zh: 18岁时，他迷上了Rudolph，但她已与一位短跑运动员订婚。

M3.en: At 16, he called Bochini his idol.
M3.zh: 16岁时，他把Bochini称为自己的偶像。

D20.en: At 16, he visited Clarín with Cyterszpiler and emphasized that Cyterszpiler was not his manager.
D20.zh: 16岁时，他和Cyterszpiler一起拜访了《号角报》，并强调Cyterszpiler不是他的经纪人。

D10.en: As a teenager, when Cebollitas lost, he threw himself on the pitch and wailed.
D10.zh: 十几岁时，Cebollitas输了比赛，他躺在球场上大哭。

D1.en: At 17, he rejoined his club and scored three goals, including the winner, against Charait.
D1.zh: 17岁时，他回到俱乐部，在对阵Charait的比赛中打入三球，包括制胜球。

D14.en: At 18, his ball control and pace brought the Olympic stadium to its feet.
D14.zh: 18岁时，他的控球和速度让奥林匹克体育场观众起立欢呼。

D13b.en: At 14, his studies took second place to training, and his parents did not oppose him.
D13b.zh: 14岁时，他把训练放在学业之上，父母也没有反对。

D13a.en: At 14, he began to be increasingly absent from school.
D13a.zh: 14岁时，他开始频繁逃学。

D18.en: He received the key to his first apartment, large enough for his family.
D18.zh: 他拿到了第一套公寓的钥匙，足够大，能住下他的家人。

D5.en: At 15, he complained to the referee about a handball and demanded a penalty.
D5.zh: 15岁时，他向裁判抱怨手球并要求点球。

M1.en: At 15, he became the youngest player in history to play in a premier-division match.
M1.zh: 15岁时，他成为历史上最年轻的顶级联赛出场球员。

D15.en: At age 10, he walked out determined to make the most of his few minutes.
D15.zh: 10岁时，他走出去，决心充分利用给他的几分钟。

D4.en: At 10, he could kill the ball and lift it up with both feet.
D4.zh: 10岁时，他能停球，然后用双脚轻松挑起。

D9.en: At 17-18, he led his team through a successful qualifying round for the Youth World Championship.
D9.zh: 17到18岁间，他带领球队成功晋级世青赛预选赛。

D7.en: At 17, he vowed never to forgive Menotti and to quit football.
D7.zh: 17岁时，他发誓绝不原谅梅诺蒂，并要退出足坛。

D6.en: At 18, he met Jorge Cyterszpiler; they struck up an immediate rapport.
D6.zh: 18岁时，他遇到Jorge Cyterszpiler，两人一拍即合。

D2.en: At 14, he began increasingly absenting himself from school.
D2.zh: 14岁时，他开始越来越频繁地逃学。

D3.en: At 10, he balanced his playthings on his left foot for long periods, spinning them in the air.
D3.zh: 10岁时，他把玩具长时间放在左脚上平衡，还不时抛向空中旋转。

D12.en: As a small child, he never forgot the social humiliation of being born into the shanty.
D12.zh: 幼年时，他从未忘记出生在棚户区的社会屈辱。

D10.en: She gets frustrated with herself when she misses a shot, but never lets it show.
D10.zh: 她失误时会对自己感到沮丧，但从不表现出来。

D1.en: At 17, she had defeated every top-ranked player.
D1.zh: 17岁时，她击败了所有顶级选手。

D14.en: She likes being the center of attention on the tennis court.
D14.zh: 她喜欢在网球场上成为焦点。

D18.en: She decided to give flowers to the next player who defeated her.
D18.zh: 她决定给下一个击败她的选手送花。

D5.en: She took a chance, went to the net, and missed.
D5.zh: 她冒险上网，但失误了。

M1.en: She faced Chris Evert in the finals of the Family Circle Magazine Cup in April 1986, at age 16.
M1.zh: 1986年4月，16岁的她在家庭圈杯决赛中对阵克里斯·埃弗特。

D15.en: She glides to her right and swings so hard she lifts off the ground.
D15.zh: 她向右滑步，用力挥拍，身体腾空。

D4.en: Her father sawed off an old racket so she could hold it at age 3.
D4.zh: 她父亲锯短旧球拍，让她3岁时能握住。

D9.en: She turned pro in fall 1982 at age 13.
D9.zh: 1982年秋，13岁的她转为职业选手。

D6.en: She and her mother played cards while waiting in airports or hotel lobbies.
D6.zh: 她和母亲在机场或酒店大堂等地方打牌。

D13a.en: Her father wouldn't let her play, fearing she'd lose her love for tennis.
D13a.zh: 她父亲不让她打，怕她失去对网球的热爱。

D20X.en: At 16, he felt that Cus walked out on him.
D20X.zh: 16岁时，他觉得卡斯抛弃了他。

M5.en: As a small child, he thought having the newest fashion gave you status.
M5.zh: 幼年时，他觉得穿最新潮的衣服就是酷，就有地位。

M8.en: At 13-14, someone saw something in him, though he didn't know how.
M8.zh: 13到14岁时，有人在他身上看到了什么，他不知道是怎么看到的。

D19.en: At 13-14, he would wear a plastic suit over Albolene for a week or two, removing it only at night for a hot bath.
D19.zh: 13到14岁时，他会在身上涂Albolene后穿塑料服一两周，只在晚上洗热水澡时脱下。

M3.en: At 12, he saw how people responded to Ali and decided he wanted to be champ.
M3.zh: 12岁时，他看到人们对阿里的反应，决心要成为世界冠军。

M7.en: As a teenager, he told Cus he would give his life to be champion.
M7.zh: 十几岁时，他对卡斯说愿意为成为冠军付出生命。

M6.en: As a teenager, he wanted someone to talk about him like that, to be part of that world.
M6.zh: 十几岁时，他希望有人那样谈论他，想成为那个世界的一部分。

D17.en: As a teenager, he worked at a home for the elderly, taking wheelchair-bound residents for walks.
D17.zh: 十几岁时，他在养老院打工，推轮椅带老人散步。

D20.en: At 16, he was partners in the gym with the dream of developing fighters.
D20.zh: 16岁时，他和别人在健身房合伙，梦想培养拳手。

M4.en: At 15, he wanted to be involved with Cus's plan to get back at the boxing establishment.
M4.zh: 15岁时，他非常想参与库斯报复拳击界的计划。

D16.en: At 13-14, he vowed to give his life to become champion.
D16.zh: 13到14岁时，他发誓要付出生命成为冠军。

D10.en: At 14-15, he spun around, nostrils flaring, and glared at her, but kept walking.
D10.zh: 14到15岁时，他转过身，鼻孔张开，瞪了她一眼，但继续走。

D1.en: At 13-14, he forced himself past his doubts and insecurities and made himself perform.
D1.zh: 13到14岁时，他强迫自己克服怀疑和不安全感，让自己表现。

D14.en: At 14, he raised his arms in the air and stepped on the prone opponent.
D14.zh: 14岁时，他举起双臂，踩在倒地的对手身上。

D13a.en: At 15-16, his formal schooling ended after his freshman year in high school.
D13a.zh: 15到16岁时，他高中一年级后正式学业结束。

D5.en: At 11, he was the bagman, loading gang spoils and running.
D5.zh: 11岁时，他负责装赃物并逃跑。

D11.en: At 14-16, he trained himself to be wicked, snapping at everybody on the way to school.
D11.zh: 14到16岁时，他训练自己变坏，上学路上对每个人吼叫。

M1.en: At 14-15, he became the national junior olympics heavyweight champion.
M1.zh: 14到15岁时，他成为全国少年奥运会重量级冠军。

D15.en: At 13, he bench-pressed 250 pounds ten times on his first try.
D15.zh: 13岁时，他第一次卧推就举起了250磅，做了十次。

D4.en: At 10, friendless, he turned to animals and kept a pigeon coop.
D4.zh: 10岁时，他没有朋友，转而养鸽子，搭了个鸽棚。

D9.en: At 14-15, he obeyed and talked things out with Bordick.
D9.zh: 14到15岁时，他听从了，并与Bordick把事情谈开了。

D7.en: At 14-15, he angrily grabbed milk containers and splattered them on walls.
D7.zh: 14到15岁时，他愤怒地抓起几个牛奶盒，摔在墙上。

D6.en: He frequently returned to Catskill with Stewart to train with D'Amato or Atlas.
D6.zh: 他经常和Stewart一起回到Catskill，跟D'Amato或Atlas训练。

D2.en: At 13, he learned moves and footwork from Stewart in afternoon sessions.
D2.zh: 13岁时，他下午跟Stewart学习动作和步法。

M3.en: At 16, trying to impress her heroine, she played terribly.
M3.zh: 16岁时，她试图给偶像留下好印象，结果打得很糟。

D16.en: At 18, she said, 'I wanted my freedom.'
D16.zh: 18岁时，她说：“我想要自由。”

D1.en: At 16, she battled to a tie-break defeat against Chris, 7–6, 6–3.
D1.zh: 16岁时，她苦战至抢七，以7–6、6–3输给克里斯。

D5.en: She defected to play every tournament and pursue her champion potential.
D5.zh: 她叛逃以便参加所有比赛，追求她知道自己能成为冠军的潜力。

D11.en: As a child, she imagined herself playing as Rod Laver.
D11.zh: 小时候，她想象自己扮演罗德·拉沃尔。

M1.en: She made the French Open finals but lost to Chris Evert.
M1.zh: 她打进了法网决赛，但输给了克里斯·埃弗特。

D15.en: At 9-10, she played tennis on the first indoor court in Prague.
D15.zh: 9到10岁时，她在布拉格第一个室内网球场打网球。

D4.en: She came to the net and threw herself at it.
D4.zh: 她冲到网前，扑向球网。

D9.en: As a child, she had a younger sister to dominate.
D9.zh: 小时候，她有一个妹妹可以让她支配。

D7.en: She ignored the Federation and didn't care about the impression of her flamboyant dresses.
D7.zh: 她无视联合会，不在乎她花哨的网球裙给人什么印象。

D6.en: She knelt down to touch the grass, a holy place for tennis players.
D6.zh: 她跪下触摸草地，这是网球选手的圣地。

D2.en: At 9, she took the train to Prague and then the tram down Plzenska street twice a week after school.
D2.zh: 9岁时，她每周两次放学后坐火车到布拉格，再换乘电车沿Plzenska街行驶。

D3.en: She had a wonderful time doing crosswords with Babicka.
D3.zh: 她和外婆一起做填字游戏，玩得很开心。

D12.en: She ran for the train to Prague for tennis practice, carrying her heavy bag.
D12.zh: 她赶火车去布拉格练网球，背着装满书和球具的沉重书包。

M4.en: As a child, she fought the Czech government and won.
M4.zh: 她小时候和捷克政府较劲，赢了。

M5.en: At 11, she thought: one day I'll eat at that counter without worrying about cost.
M5.zh: 11岁时，她想：总有一天我会在那个柜台吃饭，不用担心价格。

D8.en: At 14, she beat the top player, Kathy Chabot.
D8.zh: 14岁时，她击败了顶尖选手Kathy Chabot。

D19.en: From ages 11 to 14, she studied tennis like a sleuth inspecting a fingerprint.
D19.zh: 11到14岁间，她像侦探检查指纹一样研究网球。

M2.en: At 11, she saw her mother's wounded look and tried to mend her heart by staying upbeat.
M2.zh: 11岁时，她看到母亲受伤的表情，努力保持乐观来安抚她。

M4.en: At 14, she resolved to beat the class system and develop her gifts without seed money.
M4.zh: 14岁时，她决心打败阶级制度，在没有启动资金的情况下发展自己的天赋。

D16.en: At 15-17, she bet she would change things more than someone else.
D16.zh: 15到17岁时，她打赌自己会比别人改变更多事情。

D10.en: At age 6, she was so concerned for her father that she didn't leave the sofa and kept looking out the window.
D10.zh: 6岁时，她非常担心父亲，没有离开沙发，一直看着窗外。

D13a.en: At 11, she reluctantly stepped aside.
D13a.zh: 11岁时，她不情愿地让开了。

D18.en: At 10, she completed a dozen odd jobs around the neighborhood and collected eight dollars.
D18.zh: 10岁时，她在附近做了十几份零工，赚了八美元。

D11.en: At 14, she stared happily through the window while the world zipped by with the speed of her passing thoughts.
D11.zh: 14岁时，她开心地望着窗外，世界随着她思绪的速度飞驰而过。

D4.en: At age 10-14, she played early tennis years from 1953 to 1957.
D4.zh: 10到14岁间，她于1953到1957年打早期网球。

D9.en: At 17, she landed in Britain for her first Wimbledon and played doubles with Karen Hantze.
D9.zh: 17岁时，她抵达英国参加首次温网，并与Karen Hantze搭档双打。

M3.en: At 14, she lapped up Alice's stories and longed to become a champion like her.
M3.zh: 14岁时，她如饥似渴地听Alice的故事，渴望成为像她那样的冠军。

D17.en: At 14, she heard Alice coughing through pleurisy at night while on oxygen.
D17.zh: 14岁时，她晚上听到Alice因胸膜炎咳嗽，还连着氧气罐。

D20X.en: At 14, he was 6'9" and the best young prospect in the country.
D20X.zh: 14岁时，他身高6英尺9英寸，是全国最好的年轻苗子。

M5.en: At 14, Yao Ming was 6'9" and considered the best young prospect in China.
M5.zh: 姚明14岁时身高6英尺9英寸，被视为中国最佳年轻新秀。

M8.en: At 14, Yao Ming was 6'9" and considered the best young prospect in China.
M8.zh: 14岁时姚明身高6英尺9英寸，被视为全国最佳青年苗子。

D19.en: At 17, he was dunking nearly every chance he got and started to enjoy it.
D19.zh: 17岁时，他几乎每次机会都扣篮，甚至开始享受扣篮。

M6.en: At 16, he started to have more faith in himself.
M6.zh: 16岁时，他开始对自己更有信心。

M4.en: He received patriotic education as a child.
M4.zh: 他小时候接受了爱国主义教育。

D1.en: At 10-12, he underwent physical exams to predict his future height.
D1.zh: 10到12岁时，他接受体检以预测未来身高。

D15.en: At age 10-12, he displayed fearless intensity inspired by watching NBA on TV.
D15.zh: 他10到12岁时因看NBA电视转播而展现出无畏的激情。

D4.en: At 16, he picked up a ball and started shooting around at the basket on the other end of the gym.
D4.zh: 16岁时，他拿起球开始在体育馆另一端的篮筐投篮。

D9.en: At age 8-11, his mother sent a coach to escort him to practice, a service she offered no other athlete.
D9.zh: 8到11岁时，他母亲派教练护送他去训练，这是其他运动员没有的待遇。

D3.en: At 11, he loved reading books about foreign lands and China's imperial history.
D3.zh: 11岁时，他喜欢读关于外国和中国帝国历史的书。

D14.en: At 18 in 1996, his moves as youngest starter drew high praise from Americans.
D14.zh: 他1996年18岁时作为最年轻首发球员的动作赢得美国人高度赞扬。

D8.en: At 14, he slammed down the ball and glared at an opponent, then exploded in anger.
D8.zh: 14岁时，他狠狠扣下球，瞪着对手，然后爆发了怒气。

M3.en: As a child, he watched basketball greats with his father, idolizing Wilt Chamberlain and others.
M3.zh: 小时候，他和父亲一起看篮球巨星，崇拜张伯伦等人。

D1.en: At 12, he made the team because of practice and Jim Dart's help with weak-hand shooting.
D1.zh: 12岁时，他因练习和Jim Dart指导弱手投篮而入选球队。

D5.en: He liked the idea of choosing to play for the weaker team and trying to bring them up.
D5.zh: 他喜欢选择为弱队打球并试图提升他们的想法。

M1.en: He said all he cares about is the future and he sees an NCAA championship for Michigan State.
M1.zh: 他说他只关心未来，并且他看到了密歇根州立大学的NCAA冠军。

D15.en: In his first season at Michigan State, the Spartans finished 25-5.
D15.zh: 他在密歇根州立大学的第一个赛季，斯巴达人队取得了25胜5负的战绩。

D4.en: As a junior high student, he drove around with Jim and helped on his route.
D4.zh: 初中时，他和Jim一起开车帮他送货。

D9.en: He decided to attend Michigan State University.
D9.zh: 他决定去密歇根州立大学。

D7.en: He had no desire to play second fiddle to those guys and told UCLA to forget it.
D7.zh: 他不想给那些人当配角，并告诉UCLA算了。

D6.en: At 18, he and his teammates decided to teach opponents a lesson.
D6.zh: 18岁时，他和队友决定给对手一点教训。

D3.en: He majored in telecommunications with a minor in education and taught a fourth-grade class.
D3.zh: 他主修电信，辅修教育，并教过一个四年级班级。

D12.en: On weekends when his father didn't need him, he drove with Jim and helped on his route.
D12.zh: 周末父亲不需要他时，他开车和Jim一起帮他送货。

D13a.en: At 14, he loved his brother but couldn't agree to play for Everett; not playing was worse.
D13a.zh: 14岁时，他爱哥哥但无法同意为Everett打球；不打球更糟。

D1.en: At 15, his mother put two yuan under his pillow for a new racket; he couldn't sleep all night.
D1.zh: 15岁时，妈妈把两元钱放在他枕头下让他买新球拍，他心花怒放，夜不能寐。

D5.en: At 14-15, he sneaked into offices to practice table tennis, sometimes getting kicked out.
D5.zh: 14到15岁时，他闯进机关打乒乓球，有时被赶出来。

M1.en: At 17, he won third place in Beijing men's singles and qualified for the national competition.
M1.zh: 17岁时，他得了北京市男单第三名，取得全国比赛资格。

D15.en: At 17, he beat his master Jin Shenghua 3-0 in a match.
D15.zh: 17岁时，他和师傅靳声华比赛以3比0获胜。

D9.en: At 13-14, he designed the blackboard newspaper for his class.
D9.zh: 13到14岁时，他负责班里黑板报的美术设计。

D7.en: At 15, his father broke his ping-pong paddle in anger, and he cried.
D7.zh: 15岁时，他爸爸踩断了他的球拍，他扑在床上哭。

D6.en: At 13-14, he joined the biology group and choir, and designed the blackboard newspaper.
D6.zh: 13到14岁时，他参加了生物小组和合唱小组，还负责黑板报设计。

D2.en: At 17, he faced a crucial match for a spot in the national competition when he lost his paddle.
D2.zh: 17岁时，他在争夺全国比赛资格的关键比赛中丢了拍子。

D3.en: At 13-14, he was obsessed with model airplanes, secretly sanding sticks under the desk during class.
D3.zh: 13到14岁时，他迷上了航模，上课时偷偷在桌下磨小木条。

D11.en: At 10-11, he presented flowers to the Dalai Lama and Panchen Lama, who touched his head.
D11.zh: 10到11岁时，他给达赖和班禅献花，他们摸了摸他的头顶。

D4.en: At 6, he was sent to a martial arts school and trained in boxing and weapons for six years.
D4.zh: 6岁时，他被送到武术社拜师，练了六年拳术和刀枪剑棍。

D19.en: At 6-14, she kept blue pens in one place, black in another.
D19.zh: 6到14岁时，她把蓝笔放一处，黑笔放另一处。

M7.en: At 14, she performed, made her country proud, and left by bus, not limousine.
M7.zh: 14岁时，她上场表演，为国争光，然后坐大巴离开，没坐豪车。

M6.en: At 14, she set a personal goal for 1976 to create her own dream.
M6.zh: 14岁时，她为1976年定下个人目标：创造自己的梦想。

D17.en: At 14-18, she always invited him to join for meals despite having little.
D17.zh: 14到18岁时，她总邀请他一起吃饭，尽管自己也不富裕。

M4.en: At 12, she would have followed him through fire if it made her a better gymnast.
M4.zh: 12岁时，她愿意跟他赴汤蹈火，只要这能让她成为更好的体操运动员。

D16.en: At 18, she wrote letters to her mom about being homesick and disliking spicy food.
D16.zh: 18岁时，她写信给妈妈，说想家、不喜欢辣食。

D10.en: At 14, she cried after losing a doll someone pulled on its leg.
D10.zh: 14岁时，她因别人扯掉娃娃的腿而弄丢它，哭了起来。

D1.en: At 16, she focused on bars, competed, and got a 10 despite the vault incident.
D1.zh: 16岁时，她专注高低杠，比赛并得了10分，尽管跳马出了状况。

D14.en: At 9, she competed in the 1970 National Championships, her first big gymnastics competition.
D14.zh: 9岁时，她参加了1970年全国锦标赛，这是她的第一次大型体操比赛。

D13b.en: As a small child, her mother took her to the gym to outlet her energy.
D13b.zh: 幼年时，妈妈带她去大体育馆，想给她过剩的精力找个出口。

D13a.en: At 17, she agreed to move to Deva on condition she no longer lived with younger gymnasts.
D13a.zh: 17岁时，她同意去德瓦，条件是不再和更小的体操运动员住宿舍。

D5.en: At 17, she said she loves challenges and wants to do what no one has done.
D5.zh: 17岁时，她说她喜欢挑战，越难越好，想做没人做过的事。

D15.en: At 14, she executed each skill with expected extension and dismounted.
D15.zh: 14岁时，她按要求完成每个动作的延伸并下器械。

D4.en: As a child, she taped foam to her heels because they got bruised from hitting the bar.
D4.zh: 小时候，她往脚后跟贴泡沫，因为敲杠子敲得淤青。

D9.en: At 12, she was selected by Bela to go to Paris with Dorina.
D9.zh: 12岁时，贝拉选了她和多琳娜去巴黎。

D7.en: At 16, she started arriving late to practices, defying Bela.
D7.zh: 16岁时，她开始训练迟到，违抗贝拉。

D6.en: At 14, she said her fellow gymnasts were still her friends and sisters.
D6.zh: 14岁时，她说队友们仍然是她的朋友和姐妹。

D2.en: At age 12, she ate dinner after second practice, did homework, and had lights out by 10:00 P.M.
D2.zh: 12岁时，她在第二次训练后吃晚饭、做作业，并在晚上10点熄灯。

D3.en: At age 4-6, she learned by creating and figuring out how to make things work.
D3.zh: 4到6岁时，她通过创造和弄明白东西怎么运作来学习。

D12.en: She was born in Romania on November 12, 1961, and named Nadia Elena Comaneci.
D12.zh: 她于1961年11月12日出生在罗马尼亚，取名Nadia Elena Comaneci。

M3.en: At 11, he listened when his hero spoke.
M3.zh: 11岁时，他听偶像说话。

D10.en: At 10-11, he ran home, locked his bedroom door, and cried all night.
D10.zh: 10到11岁时，他跑回家，锁上卧室门，哭了一整夜。

D1.en: At 14, he was booed; not many years later, everybody loved him.
D1.zh: 14岁时，他被嘘；没过几年，大家都喜欢他了。

D13b.en: As a child, he learned from his dad that stardom carries responsibility.
D13b.zh: 他从小从父亲那里学到，明星身份意味着责任。

D18.en: At 17, he used bonus money to buy a new Pontiac Trans-Am.
D18.zh: 17岁时，他用奖金买了一辆新的庞蒂亚克Trans-Am。

D5.en: At 17, he carefully took down the new wording of the deal that would make him rich.
D5.zh: 17岁时，他仔细记下了能让他致富的新协议条款。

M1.en: At 18, he read the contract and said, 'Third. I've got to finish at least third.'
M1.zh: 18岁时，他看了合同说：‘第三。我必须至少拿到第三。’

D4.en: At 2, he bounced impatiently at the farmhouse door in snow clothes.
D4.zh: 2岁时，他穿着雪衣在农舍门口不耐烦地蹦跳。

D9.en: At 16-17, he jumped over the boards whenever a teammate yelled for a center.
D9.zh: 16到17岁时，每当队友喊需要中锋，他就翻过板墙上场。

D7.en: At 14, he told his dad he wasn't going back, regardless.
D7.zh: 14岁时，他对父亲说不管怎样都不回去了。

D6.en: At 8, he wore the A as Brantford's alternate captain.
D6.zh: 8岁时，他戴着A标志担任布兰特福德队的副队长。

D20.en: At 17, he was shipped to the Edmonton Oilers with Mio and Driscoll.
D20.zh: 17岁时，他和Mio、Driscoll被送到埃德蒙顿油人队。

D20X.en: He wrote to Virginia but only got an admission form back; no one came to watch him.
D20X.zh: 他写信给Virginia，但只收到一张入学表格，没人来看他。

D8.en: He drove to the basket and unleashed one of the most thunderous dunks of his career.
D8.zh: 他带球冲向篮筐，完成了他职业生涯中最震撼的扣篮之一。

M6.en: At 16-17, he attended Dean Smith's camp and, after Smith showed personal interest, chose Carolina as his first choice.
M6.zh: 16到17岁时，他参加了Dean Smith的训练营，在Smith对他表现出个人兴趣后，他把卡罗来纳作为首选。

D17.en: He had an easy way with children, delighting in them and sweeping them up as toddlers.
D17.zh: 他很容易和孩子相处，喜欢他们，在他们蹒跚学步时把他们抱起来。

D16.en: He was a chatterbox who loved verbal gamesmanship.
D16.zh: 他是个话匣子，喜欢言语上的较量。

D10.en: He wanted them to lose to prove he could help them.
D10.zh: 他希望他们输，以证明自己能帮助他们。

D1.en: At 17, he went 4-for-4 with 3 RBIs as Laney beat Southern Wayne 9-2.
D1.zh: 17岁时，他4次上场4次安打，贡献3分打点，帮助Laney以9-2击败Southern Wayne。

D14.en: He was MVP of the league and MVP of the all-star game, beginning to make his name.
D14.zh: 他是联赛MVP和全明星赛MVP，开始打响名声。

D13b.en: He was raised by parents determined that their children not be blinded or burdened by race.
D13b.zh: 他从小被父母教育，不要被种族问题蒙蔽或拖累。

D13a.en: At 17, he said his father wanted him to play baseball but now wants him to pursue basketball.
D13a.zh: 17岁时，他说父亲原本希望他打棒球，但现在希望他打篮球。

D5.en: As a small child, he piled lawn chairs high to demonstrate his flying prowess.
D5.zh: 幼年时，他把草坪椅堆得很高来展示他的飞行本领。

M1.en: At 17-18, he averaged 27.8 points and 12 rebounds, leading Laney to a 19-4 record.
M1.zh: 17到18岁时，他场均27.8分12篮板，带领Laney取得19胜4负的战绩。

D15.en: At 16, he stole the ball and dunked it.
D15.zh: 16岁时，他抢断球并扣篮。

D4.en: At 18, he mugged for cameras, leaning forward to measure hands with someone.
D4.zh: 18岁时，他对着镜头做鬼脸，探身和别人比手大小。

D9.en: At 17, he was singled out by Williams to stay for a second session.
D9.zh: 17岁时，他被Williams单独留下参加第二期训练。

D7.en: At 15, he got into a fight and hit another boy.
D7.zh: 15岁时，他和一个男孩打了一架，把他揍了一顿。

D6.en: At 17, he began a friendship with someone that grew over months.
D6.zh: 17岁时，他和一个人开始了友谊，并在接下来的几个月里不断加深。

D2.en: At 18, he listened closely to coaches and immediately applied their advice.
D2.zh: 18岁时，他认真听教练的话，然后马上去做。

D3.en: At 16, he asked his coach what he needed to do to improve.
D3.zh: 16岁时，他问教练：我需要怎么做才能变得更好？

M3.en: Like his idol Magic Johnson, he spent much time around the basket defensively.
M3.zh: 像他的偶像Magic Johnson一样，他花了很多时间在篮下防守。

M4.en: The knowledge of America's ugly past infuriated him and occupied his mind.
M4.zh: 对美国丑陋历史的了解让他愤怒，占据了他的思绪。

M3.en: He said he copied Brother Matthias.
M3.zh: 他说他模仿了Matthias修士。

M6.en: He thought of becoming a priest and took the question to Brother Matthias.
M6.zh: 他考虑过当神父，并把这个问题带给了Matthias修士。

D17.en: He bought candy and distributed it to smaller boys, especially orphans.
D17.zh: 他买糖果分给比他小的男孩，特别是孤儿。

D1.en: As punishment, he stood alone on the road for five days, then was given his glove and ball.
D1.zh: 作为惩罚，他独自在路上站了五天，然后Matthias修士给了他手套和棒球，让他为比赛恢复状态。

D14.en: At 18, he was known as the Bayonne fence buster, swinging a bat.
D14.zh: 18岁时，他被称为贝永的击栅者，挥着球棒。

D13b.en: At 7, he landed in an environment controlled by stern and steady hands.
D13b.zh: 7岁时，他进入了一个由严厉而稳健的手控制的环境。

M1.en: At 16-18, he was No. 1 among over a thousand boys in one of the most admired pursuits.
M1.zh: 16到18岁时，他在一千多个男孩中排名第一，从事一项最受推崇的活动。

D4.en: As a child at St. Mary's, he learned carpentry and cigar rolling.
D4.zh: 幼年在圣玛丽时，他学了木工和卷雪茄。

D9.en: At age 7-15, he was large for his age, quick-tempered but generally sunny.
D9.zh: 7到15岁间，他比同龄人高大，脾气急但通常开朗。

D7.en: As a child and teen, he had a slug-out with a newly arrived bully.
D7.zh: 幼年到十几岁时，他和一个新来的恶霸打了一架。

D6.en: As a small child, he found time for baseball before age seven.
D6.zh: 幼年时，他七岁前就抽空打棒球。

D2.en: At 7-15, he worked in the tailor shop learning to make shirts with about ninety other boys.
D2.zh: 7到15岁时，他在裁缝店和大约九十个男孩一起学做衬衫。

D3.en: At 15-18, he used overtime earnings to buy materials to make baseballs for small boys.
D3.zh: 15到18岁间，他用加班收入买材料为小男孩做棒球。

D12.en: Babe Ruth was delivered by midwife Minnie Graf as a newborn.
D12.zh: Babe Ruth出生时由助产士Minnie Graf接生。

D20X.en: At 15, he was offered a small salary to play professionally for Noroeste.
D20X.zh: 15岁时，他收到一份小薪水，为Noroeste队踢职业比赛。

M5.en: At 15, he wanted to go out and show his friends how grown-up he looked.
M5.zh: 15岁时，他想出去向朋友们展示自己看起来有多成熟。

M8.en: At 15, he couldn't believe he was actually leaving home.
M8.zh: 15岁时，他不敢相信自己真的要离开家了。

M7.en: At 15, he was told to take opportunities when they come and not end up like his father.
M7.zh: 15岁时，他被告知要抓住机会，不要像他父亲那样。

D17.en: He promised to share his food with someone.
D17.zh: 他承诺和别人分享食物。

D20.en: At age 15, Pelé traveled with Valdemar de Brito to Santos to present at the club.
D20.zh: 15岁时，Pelé与Valdemar de Brito前往桑托斯俱乐部报到。

M4.en: At 15, he was told to take opportunities and not end up like his father.
M4.zh: 15岁时，他被告知要抓住机会，不要像他父亲那样。

D10.en: At 17 in 1958, he cried like a baby while teammates pummeled him.
D10.zh: 1958年17岁时，他哭得像个婴儿，队友们捶打着他。

D1.en: At 15 in 1956, he locked himself in a room and cried.
D1.zh: 1956年15岁时，他锁上门躺在床上大哭。

D14.en: At 15-16, he scored four goals in a 6-1 win.
D14.zh: 15到16岁时，他在一场6-1的比赛中攻入四球。

D13a.en: At 7, he obeyed Dona Celeste and went door to door for a week.
D13a.zh: 7岁时，他听从Dona Celeste的话，挨家挨户走了一周。

D18.en: At 7-8, he earned over two cruzeiros and went home arm in arm.
D18.zh: 7到8岁时，他赚了超过两个克鲁赛罗，然后手挽手回家。

D5.en: At 14, he was talked into visiting a local prostitute by a friend.
D5.zh: 14岁时，他被朋友Zinho说服，一起去找了一个当地妓女。

D11.en: At 7-8, he dreamed of flying a plane with goggles and boots.
D11.zh: 7到8岁时，他梦想戴上护目镜、穿上夹克和靴子，驾驶飞机飞向天空。

M1.en: As a child, he swore he would do it as soon as he grew up.
M1.zh: 小时候，他发誓长大后一定要做到。

D15.en: At 7-8, he ran up and down the field kicking and tackling until dark.
D15.zh: 7到8岁时，他在球场上跑来跑去，踢球、抢断，直到天黑。

D4.en: At age 7, he started shining shoes; a friend helped him build a shoe-shine kit.
D4.zh: 7岁时，他开始擦鞋，朋友帮他做了个擦鞋箱。

D9.en: At 15-16, he was given a chance by Lula to play with the second-stringers.
D9.zh: 15到16岁时，他得到Lula给的机会，和二线队员一起踢球。

D6.en: At age 15-16, he spent hours talking at the club or restaurant, and occasionally went to a movie with friends.
D6.zh: 15到16岁时，他花很多时间在俱乐部或餐厅聊天，偶尔和朋友看电影。

D3.en: At age 8, he decided there were probably other reasons for learning to read and write.
D3.zh: 8岁时，他决定学习读写可能还有其他原因。

D12.en: He grew up in a family struggling on meager earnings.
D12.zh: 他在靠微薄收入维持的家庭中长大。

D2.en: At 17, he trained daily and received steam towel treatments for injuries from the USSR game.
D2.zh: 17岁时，他每天训练，并因苏联比赛中的伤势接受蒸毛巾治疗。

D8.en: At 18, he wanted to beat everything Trip stood for and prove he was better than the country club clique.
D8.zh: 18岁时，他想打败Trip代表的一切，向乡村俱乐部圈子证明自己更优秀。

M3.en: At 16-17, he told his caddie, 'Got to be like Nicklaus. Got to will this in the hole.'
M3.zh: 16到17岁时，他对球童说：‘要像尼克劳斯一样。要把这个推进洞。’

M2.en: At 18, his family had little money and few connections; their only chance was his success as a golfer.
M2.zh: 18岁时，他家没钱没门路，唯一的机会就是靠他打高尔夫成功。

D16.en: When asked by The New York Times if racism at some clubs motivated him to win at Shoal Creek, he said one word: no.
D16.zh: 当《纽约时报》问他某些俱乐部的种族主义是否激励他在 Shoal Creek 获胜时，他只回答了一个字：不。

D10.en: At 16, one of the unspoken rules at home was to keep their feelings to themselves.
D10.zh: 16岁时，家里的潜规则之一是把情绪藏在心里。

D1.en: At 11, he entered thirty-three junior tournaments that summer and won them all.
D1.zh: 11岁时，那年夏天他参加了33场青少年比赛，全部获胜。

D18.en: At 5, he was offered a free set of new clubs.
D18.zh: 5岁时，有人免费送他一套新球杆。

D5.en: At 16, he competed in a PGA Tour event, the Nissan Los Angeles Open, but missed the cut.
D5.zh: 16岁时，他参加了美巡赛日产洛杉矶公开赛，但未能晋级。

M1.en: At 15, he won the U.S. Junior Amateur, becoming the youngest and first Black winner.
M1.zh: 15岁时，他赢得美国青少年业余锦标赛，成为最年轻且首位黑人冠军。

D15.en: At 16 years and 2 months, he became the youngest player ever in a PGA Tour event.
D15.zh: 16岁零2个月时，他成为PGA巡回赛史上最年轻的参赛选手。

D7.en: At 5, a classmate tied him to a tree on his first day of kindergarten.
D7.zh: 5岁时，他在幼儿园第一天被同学绑在树上。

D6.en: At 16, he loved being with the Gravell family and feeling their warmth.
D6.zh: 16岁时，他喜欢和Gravell一家在一起，感受他们的温暖。

D2.en: From age 2, his father made him practice two hours every day.
D2.zh: 从2岁起，他父亲让他每天练习两小时。

D3.en: At age 1.5, he was particularly receptive when his father taught him a good swing.
D3.zh: 他1岁半时非常善于接受，他父亲教他好的挥杆动作。

M3.en: He wanted to be like Jim Clark, his Formula One hero.
M3.zh: 他想成为像Jim Clark那样的F1英雄。

D1.en: Coming sixth only made him want to win in Europe more.
D1.zh: 第六名反而让他更想在欧洲获胜。

D13b.en: He did just enough in school to keep his toy kart.
D13b.zh: 他学习刚好够格，以保住心爱的卡丁车。

D13a.en: At 17, he left technical school one year before graduation to devote himself to racing.
D13a.zh: 17岁时，他提前一年离开技术学校，全身心投入赛车。

D5.en: At 13, he was completely fearless on the circuit.
D5.zh: 13岁时，他在赛道上完全无所畏惧。

D11.en: At 10, his father gave him a full-sized kart with a 100 cc engine.
D11.zh: 10岁时，父亲送他一辆带100cc引擎的全尺寸卡丁车。

D15.en: At 13, he won his first competitive kart race at Interlagos.
D15.zh: 13岁时，他在Interlagos赢得了第一场卡丁车赛。

D4.en: At age 4, he received his first hand-built model car from his father.
D4.zh: 4岁时，他收到了父亲亲手制作的第一辆模型车。

D7.en: At 8, he took the family car out and was caught by police.
D7.zh: 8岁时，他开家里的车出去，被警察抓到。

D2.en: At 10-13, he practiced and perfected his natural ability at home and on a kart circuit at Parque Anhembi.
D2.zh: 10到13岁时，他在家和Anhembi公园的卡丁车赛道上练习，完善了自己的天赋。

D3.en: At 4, his father built him a 1 hp kart, and he got his dream toy.
D3.zh: 4岁时，他父亲为他造了一辆1马力的卡丁车，他得到了梦想的玩具。

D19.en: He applied the same discipline from cricket to keeping his diary.
D19.zh: 他把板球场上的纪律用在了写日记上。

M2.en: His mother promised him a new cricket bat if he scored a century against Bowral's enemies.
M2.zh: 他母亲答应他，如果他对阵鲍勒尔的敌人拿到百分，就给他一个新板球拍。

D20.en: At about 12, he became secretary of the Bowral Town Cricket Club.
D20.zh: 大约12岁时，他担任了鲍勒尔镇板球俱乐部的秘书。

D16.en: He scored 98 before being caught in the slips off a slow bowler.
D16.zh: 他得了98分，然后被一个慢投手在接球区接杀。

D1.en: His efforts were unremarkable until the Saturday before Christmas in 1925.
D1.zh: 他的努力起初平平，直到1925年圣诞节前的那个星期六。

D14.en: He made his first century, scoring 115 not out out of a total of 156.
D14.zh: 他拿到了第一个百分，在总分156中得了115分未出局。

D18.en: He suggested his mother owed him three new bats, but settled for one.
D18.zh: 他建议母亲欠他三根新球拍，但最后只拿了一根。

D5.en: At 18, he sought and obtained leave to go to Sydney with his father.
D5.zh: 18岁时，他请假并获准与父亲一起去悉尼。

D11.en: He invented two sides of famous cricketers and played for each in turn.
D11.zh: 他发明了两队著名板球手，轮流为每队打球。

M1.en: At 18, he broke his own local record with 320 not out, including six sixes and 43 fours.
M1.zh: 18岁时，他打破了自己的本地纪录，得到320分未出局，包括6个六分和43个四分。

D15.en: He won the 100-yards, 200-yards, quarter-mile and half-mile events for his age group.
D15.zh: 他赢得了自己年龄组的100码、200码、四分之一英里和半英里比赛。

D4.en: As a small child, he used the laundry door as a wicket and threw a golf ball at the tank stand.
D4.zh: 幼年时，他用洗衣房门当三柱门，把高尔夫球扔向水箱架。

D6.en: At 17, he enrolled as a regular member of the Bowral Town Club.
D6.zh: 17岁时，他注册成为鲍勒尔镇俱乐部的正式成员。

D2.en: At 18, he found time for tennis and a new love: motoring.
D2.zh: 18岁时，他仍抽时间打网球，并爱上了开车。

D3.en: As a small child, he invented games in which he was his own opponent.
D3.zh: 幼年时，他发明了以自己为对手的游戏。

D12.en: As a child, he was disciplined in the hard work of a family farm.
D12.zh: 幼年时，他在家庭农场的艰苦劳动中受到纪律训练。

M5.en: At 18, Robinson was asked how he would run 98 yards for a touchdown against the speaker's team.
M5.zh: 18岁时，罗宾逊被问及如何在对方面前跑98码达阵。

D16.en: At 18, Robinson was asked how he would gain 98 yards for a touchdown against the speaker's team.
D16.zh: 18岁时，有人问Robinson如何在对阵中推进98码达阵。

D1.en: He failed to place in the California state championships.
D1.zh: 他在加州州锦标赛中未能获得名次。

D14.en: He took a kickoff, reversed his field three times, and returned it for a touchdown.
D14.zh: 他接住开球，三次变向，然后回攻达阵。

D5.en: He was blindsided early in a game after a whistle, breaking two of his ribs.
D5.zh: 他在比赛中被偷袭，哨响后肋骨被打断两根。

M1.en: His game-breaking ability as a runner made his school a powerhouse.
M1.zh: 他作为跑锋的突破能力让学校成为强队。

D15.en: He intercepted a pass and ran it back 92 yards for a touchdown in an easy win.
D15.zh: 他截获一个传球，回跑92码达阵得分，轻松获胜。

D4.en: At about 10-12, he took a horse by the house and his mother rode it sidesaddle.
D4.zh: 大约10到12岁时，他牵了一匹马到房子旁，他母亲侧身骑了上去。

D3.en: He listened to game broadcasts on the radio at three in the morning.
D3.zh: 他凌晨三点在厨房听比赛广播。

M3.en: In his early teens, he tried to emulate a man he hero-worshipped.
M3.zh: 他十几岁时试图模仿他崇拜的一个人。

M2.en: At 17, he was inspired by his father and Jack Grout talking about Bob Jones's 1920 Open finish.
M2.zh: 17岁时，他受到父亲和Jack Grout谈论Bob Jones在1920年公开赛成绩的激励。

D1.en: At 16, he tried to qualify for the U.S. Open but became second alternate.
D1.zh: 16岁时，他首次尝试参加美国公开赛资格赛，但成为第二替补。

D14.en: At 15, he was the youngest player in the field.
D14.zh: 15岁时，他是参赛选手中最年轻的。

D5.en: From age 13, he played golf with a friend, often ruining scores by outslugging each other.
D5.zh: 从13岁起，他常和朋友一起打高尔夫，因互相较劲而毁掉成绩。

M1.en: At 13, he won the Ohio State Juniors by one shot.
M1.zh: 13岁时，他以一杆优势赢得俄亥俄州青少年赛。

D15.en: At 16, he won the Columbus Junior Match-play Championship 2 up.
D15.zh: 16岁时，他以2 up赢得哥伦布青少年比洞赛冠军。

D4.en: At 10, he got a set of cut-down Hillerich & Bradsbys and started hacking around.
D4.zh: 10岁时，他得到一套截短的Hillerich & Bradsby球杆，开始一起乱打。

D9.en: His father convinced him that he could handle the job himself.
D9.zh: 他父亲说服他，他自己能处理这项工作。

D2.en: His father first put a club in his hands on a spring day in 1950 at Scioto Country Club.
D2.zh: 1950年春天的一天，他父亲在Scioto乡村俱乐部第一次把球杆放到他手里。

D3.en: He became aware of Jones in 1950 when he started golf at age ten.
D3.zh: 他在1950年十岁开始打高尔夫时知道了Jones。

D12.en: He was raised chiefly by his father and elder brother after losing his mother at age eight.
D12.zh: 他八岁时失去母亲，主要由父亲和哥哥抚养。

M2.en: At 17, he was the first in his family to go to college.
M2.zh: 17岁时，他成为家里第一个上大学的人。

D16.en: At 16, he told someone he thought he was gay.
D16.zh: 16岁时，他告诉别人他觉得自己是同性恋。

D10.en: At 16, he fell for someone like a boulder off the ten-meter platform.
D10.zh: 16岁时，他像从十米跳台掉下的石头一样爱上了某人。

D1.en: At 16, he made the team in ten-meter platform and came in first again.
D1.zh: 16岁时，他入选十米台队伍并再次获得第一名。

D14.en: As a small child, he made his stage debut at age three with a microphone.
D14.zh: 幼年时，他三岁登台，老师跟着他用麦克风。

D13a.en: At 11, he put on a wet-suit jacket and went down to the pool.
D13a.zh: 11岁时，他穿上湿式保暖夹克，走下泳池。

D18.en: At 17-18, he picked up two more part-time jobs to save for college.
D18.zh: 17到18岁时，他又打了两份零工攒大学学费。

D5.en: At 17-18, he went to his first gay dance clubs and bars with drama students.
D5.zh: 17到18岁时，他和戏剧系同学第一次去了同性恋舞厅和酒吧。

D11.en: At 7-8, he was attracted to an older cousin and tried to spend time with him.
D11.zh: 7到8岁时，他被一个表哥吸引，想方设法和他待在一起。

M1.en: At 10-12, he was pushed by name-calling to strive to be better than everyone.
M1.zh: 10到12岁时，辱骂促使他努力比所有人都优秀。

D15.en: At 10, he performed a reverse dive layout.
D15.zh: 10岁时，他完成了一个反身直体跳水。

D7.en: As a small child, he skipped performances because his mother feared his father's anger.
D7.zh: 幼年时，他因为妈妈怕爸爸生气而跳过表演。

D6.en: At 14, he came home every day after school and sat at the kitchen table talking for an hour.
D6.zh: 14岁时，他每天放学回家，坐在厨房桌边聊一个小时左右。

D2.en: At 3, he repeated every step in his head until he visualized getting it right.
D2.zh: 3岁时，他在脑子里反复演练每一步直到想象出正确动作。

D12.en: He was the first in his family to go to college.
D12.zh: 他是家里第一个上大学的人。

D20X.en: At 16, he was dropped from the team after a duck.
D20X.zh: 16岁时，他因得零分被球队弃用。

M5.en: At 16, he took on Abdul Qadir in a way that Qadir and all who saw it would never forget.
M5.zh: 16岁时，他挑战阿卜杜勒·卡迪尔，方式让卡迪尔和所有观众永生难忘。

M8.en: At 16, he tried to make the near-impossible possible.
M8.zh: 16岁时，他试图让近乎不可能的事成为可能。

D8.en: At 16, he faced Imran Khan and stayed at the crease.
D8.zh: 16岁时，他面对Imran Khan并坚守在场上。

M3.en: At 16, he and Manjrekar stayed up late playing soft-ball cricket.
M3.zh: 16岁时，他和Manjrekar熬夜打软式板球。

D17.en: At 17, he caught the ball near the boundary and honestly signaled a six.
D17.zh: 17岁时，他在边界附近接球并诚实地示意是六分。

M2.en: At 16, he tried to make the near-impossible possible.
M2.zh: 16岁时，他试图让几乎不可能的事变成可能。

D20.en: At 12-13, he was taken into a club, scored a quick thirty, and won a special batting prize for consistent performances.
D20.zh: 12到13岁时，他被俱乐部接纳，快速得了30分，并因稳定表现获得特别击球奖。

D16.en: At 16, he took on Abdul Qadir in a manner that Qadir and all who saw the game would never forget.
D16.zh: 16岁时，他以一种让卡迪尔和所有观众都难以忘怀的方式挑战了阿卜杜勒·卡迪尔。

D10.en: At 17, he was self-conscious, out of his depth, very shy, but anxious to cooperate.
D10.zh: 17岁时，他感到难为情、力不从心、非常害羞，但急于配合。

D14.en: At 17, he took the car around Mumbai, drove it to match venues, and showed it proudly to friends.
D14.zh: 17岁时，他开车在孟买兜风，开到比赛场地，并骄傲地向朋友展示。

D13b.en: At 15-16, he appeared successfully for his Class X exams in March 1989.
D13b.zh: 15到16岁时，他在1989年3月顺利通过了十年级考试。

D18.en: At 17, he did his first ad, perhaps the only one he has done for free.
D18.zh: 17岁时，他拍了第一支广告，可能是他唯一一次免费做的广告。

D5.en: At 17, he asked to face West Indian fast bowlers after playing local pacers.
D5.zh: 17岁时，他请求与西印度群岛的快投手交手，因为他已经打过本地的快速投手。

D11.en: At 16, he sleep-walked to the corridor asking about a man from Malik Sports who was to deliver his bats.
D11.zh: 16岁时，他梦游到走廊，询问一个来自Malik Sports、要送他球拍的人。

D15.en: At 16, he wore only a half-sleeved shirt without a vest while batting comfortably.
D15.zh: 16岁时，他只穿一件半袖衬衫，没穿背心，却打得很自在。

D9.en: At 15-16, he and Hattangadi put on 133 runs to rescue Mumbai.
D9.zh: 15到16岁时，他和Hattangadi合作拿下133分，把孟买队从困境中拉出来。

D6.en: At 11, Acharekar made him a member of his club, Kamat Memorial Cricket Club.
D6.zh: 11岁时，Acharekar让他加入了自己的俱乐部Kamat Memorial Cricket Club。

D3.en: At 18, he starts thinking about it, listens to any sound suggestions, and comes back prepared.
D3.zh: 18岁时，他开始思考这件事，听取任何合理的建议，然后回来做好准备。

D2.en: At 16, he stayed at the crease for 195 minutes and saw India through a critical stage with Sidhu.
D2.zh: 16岁时，他在场上待了195分钟，和Sidhu一起帮印度队度过了关键阶段。

D14.en: At age 9, he felt the first hint of football fascination.
D14.zh: 9岁时，他第一次感受到足球的魅力。

D13b.en: After elementary school, he became an insurance apprentice at Allianz.
D13b.zh: 小学毕业后，他去安联当保险学徒。

D13a.en: In the middle of his apprenticeship, he defied his father and joined FC Bayern to become a professional.
D13a.zh: 学徒期间，他违抗父亲，加入拜仁慕尼黑成为职业球员。

D18.en: At 17, he signed his first professional contract with Bayern, with a basic salary of DM 160.
D18.zh: 17岁时，他与拜仁签下第一份职业合同，基本工资160马克。

M1.en: Professionalism in sports gripped him as a very young man.
M1.zh: 他很年轻时就被体育的职业精神所吸引。

D15.en: At about 15, when the youth team goalkeeper was out, the coach put him, the tall center forward, in goal.
D15.zh: 15岁左右，青年队门将缺席时，教练让他这个高中锋去守门。

D4.en: At 13, he watched Garrincha's wizardry on TV during the 1958 World Cup in Sweden.
D4.zh: 13岁时，他在电视上观看了1958年瑞典世界杯上Garrincha的魔幻表演。

D7.en: After a slap, he reacted defiantly and signed his first professional contract with local rival Bayern.
D7.zh: 挨了一耳光后，他叛逆地签下了与当地对手拜仁的第一份职业合同。

D6.en: He was lifted onto the roof of a construction shack by someone.
D6.zh: 他被人举到一间建筑棚屋的屋顶上。

D3.en: At 13, he realized that wasn't his game, but Garrincha's displays may have helped show him his path.
D3.zh: 13岁时，他意识到那不是他的比赛，但加林查的表现可能帮他找到了自己的路。

D12.en: He was born on September 11, 1945, into a time of need and hunger in bombed-out Munich streets.
D12.zh: 他于1945年9月11日出生，那时慕尼黑街头被炸毁，充满贫困和饥饿。

M4.en: At 14, he became aware of his desire to show off and please people.
M4.zh: 14岁时，他意识到自己想炫耀并取悦他人。

D10.en: At 17, he missed a short putt and hurled his putter in frustration.
D10.zh: 17岁时，他推短杆失误，一气之下把推杆扔了出去。

D1.en: He was the top golfer at his high school for four years, losing only one match.
D1.zh: 他在高中高尔夫球队当了四年一号选手，只输过一场比赛。

D14.en: At 11-12, he brazenly said 'I'm Arnold Palmer' every time.
D14.zh: 11到12岁时，他每次都厚着脸皮说“我是阿诺德·帕尔默”。

D13a.en: After his father's warning, he never threw a golf club in anger again.
D13a.zh: 在父亲警告后，他再也没有生气地扔过球杆。

D18.en: At 18, he told Bud he was considering joining the Army to get his military service out of the way.
D18.zh: 18岁时，他告诉Bud他考虑参军以完成兵役。

D5.en: At 16, he ran away from home without his golf clubs.
D5.zh: 16岁时，他离家出走，没带高尔夫球杆。

D11.en: As a teenager, he said 'I played golf in my head' to practice mentally.
D11.zh: 十几岁时，他说“我在脑子里打高尔夫”来进行心理练习。

M1.en: He won the Western Pennsylvania Interscholastic Athletic League Championship in 1946 and 1947.
M1.zh: 他赢得了1946年和1947年的西宾夕法尼亚校际体育联盟冠军。

D15.en: As a teenager, he had broad shoulders, a barrel chest, big biceps, muscular forearms, a flat stomach, and narrow hips.
D15.zh: 十几岁时，他肩膀宽阔、胸膛厚实、二头肌发达、前臂肌肉结实、腹部平坦、臀部窄小。

D4.en: At 3, he started playing golf with a cut-off hickory-shaft brassie and a sawed-off iron given by his father.
D4.zh: 3岁时，他用父亲给的截短胡桃木杆身2号木和锯短铁杆开始打高尔夫。

D7.en: At 17, he begged his father to pull strings for a golf favor.
D7.zh: 17岁时，他求父亲帮忙在打高尔夫球上通融一下。

D6.en: As a teenager, he and a friend often smelled of paint, glue, or varnish from their projects.
D6.zh: 十几岁时，他和一个朋友身上经常有油漆、胶水或清漆的味道。

D2.en: As a teenager, he credited his father, his only golf instructor, for his success.
D2.zh: 十几岁时，他把成功归功于父亲，他唯一的高尔夫教练。

D3.en: As a teenager, he assembled balsa wood, plywood, construction paper, and lacquer model kits.
D3.zh: 十几岁时，他组装轻木、胶合板、建筑纸和漆模型套件。

D12.en: At 18, he saw his father struggling to feed the family and finance his college education.
D12.zh: 18岁时，他看到父亲艰难地养家糊口并供他上大学。

M5.en: At 18, he imagines becoming famous and giving his hat to someone who will tell everyone it was his.
M5.zh: 18岁时，他想象自己成名后把帽子送人，那人会告诉所有人那是他的帽子。

D20.en: At 15, he stars at shortstop in a softball league for Sello Rojo.
D20.zh: 15岁时，他在Sello Rojo赞助的垒球队担任游击手。

D14.en: At 18, he stands out at a tryout, throwing bullets from center to third.
D14.zh: 18岁时，他在试训中表现出色，从中外野精准传球到三垒。

D13b.en: At 18, his father signs his contract because he is a minor.
D13b.zh: 18岁时，因未成年，合同由他父亲签署。

D18.en: At 14-18, he bought lottery tickets in San Juan with bus fare from his father.
D18.zh: 14到18岁时，他用父亲给的车费去圣胡安买彩票。

D5.en: At 18 in 1954, he fidgeted with his hat and flung it out an open window.
D5.zh: 1954年他18岁时，他摆弄帽子然后把它扔出窗外。

D11.en: He made his first baseballs from socks and bottle caps.
D11.zh: 他用袜子和瓶盖做了他的第一个棒球。

D15.en: In high school, he starred in baseball and track, competing in javelin, high jump, and 400m.
D15.zh: 高中时，他在棒球和田径中表现出色，参加了标枪、跳高和400米跑。

D4.en: At 14-18, he squeezed a hard rubber ball to strengthen his forearms when not playing.
D4.zh: 14到18岁时，他不打球时就捏硬橡胶球来锻炼前臂。

D7.en: At 16+, he was suspended for ten days for refusing to catch with two hands.
D7.zh: 16岁多时，他因拒绝用双手接球被禁赛十天。

D6.en: At 16-17, he occasionally participated in track and field events at his high school.
D6.zh: 16到17岁时，他偶尔参加高中的田径项目。

D3.en: At 14-18, he crouched close to the radio to hear how his idol Monte Irvin was doing.
D3.zh: 14到18岁时，他蹲在收音机旁听偶像Monte Irvin的表现。

M3.en: As a small child, he idolizes Monte Irvin, San Juan's graceful outfielder.
M3.zh: 幼年时，他崇拜圣胡安的外野手Monte Irvin。

M1.en: At 18 in 1952, he stroked line drives all over the field.
M1.zh: 1952年他18岁时，他击出平飞球遍布全场。

M3.en: As a child, she idolized Carin Gabarra.
M3.zh: 小时候，她崇拜Carin Gabarra。

D1.en: At around 10, she learned to head the ball by playing with boys.
D1.zh: 10岁左右，她和男孩踢球学会了头球。

D15.en: At 10-12, she played soccer with boys in Modesto, California.
D15.zh: 10到12岁时，她在加州莫德斯托和男孩踢球。

D4.en: At 5-6, she decided to learn proper trapping to avoid getting hit in the stomach.
D4.zh: 五六岁时，她决定学好停球以免被球砸肚子。

D2.en: At 14-15, she regained her rhythm, beat opponents, and felt confident on the ball.
D2.zh: 14到15岁时，她找回了节奏，过人自如，控球自信。

D3.en: At 14, she watched the 1986 World Cup on TV and followed it closely.
D3.zh: 14岁时，她在电视上看了1986年世界杯，并认真关注了比赛。

D6.en: At 14, she played for the North Texas State Team at an ODP tournament in Louisiana.
D6.zh: 14岁时，她在路易斯安那州的奥运发展计划锦标赛中为北得克萨斯州队踢球。

D8.en: At 12, she knocked a boy squarely to the floor without hesitation.
D8.zh: 12岁时，她毫不犹豫地把一个男孩打倒在地。

M3.en: At 17, she was enthralled with star athletes and resolved to be in the next Olympics.
M3.zh: 17岁时，她崇拜明星运动员，决心参加下一届奥运会。

D16.en: At 17-18, she was so argumentative that you couldn't win an argument with her.
D16.zh: 17到18岁时，她吵架从没输过。

D1.en: As a small child, she won the marble championship against older kids.
D1.zh: 幼年时，她赢了弹珠比赛，打败了比她大的孩子。

D14.en: She loved the limelight and never hesitated to boast about her accomplishments.
D14.zh: 她喜欢出风头，从不犹豫炫耀自己的成就。

D13a.en: At 18, her father told her 'You go!' and she obeyed.
D13a.zh: 18岁时，她父亲对她说“你去！”，她听从了。

D18.en: She sewed burlap bags at a potato-gunnysack factory for a penny each.
D18.zh: 她在土豆麻袋厂缝麻袋，一个一分钱。

D5.en: She soaped trolley tracks to make streetcars slide and halt.
D5.zh: 她在电车轨道上涂肥皂，让电车打滑停下。

M1.en: She was named to all-city and all-state basketball squads as a junior.
M1.zh: 她高三时入选全市和全州篮球队。

D15.en: She played her first game for the Golden Cyclones against the defending national champions.
D15.zh: 她为Golden Cyclones打了第一场比赛，对手是卫冕全国冠军。

D4.en: She learned to hang by her toes, flip in the air, and walk the tightrope without an umbrella.
D4.zh: 她学会了用脚趾倒挂、空中翻跟头和走钢丝不用伞。

D9.en: She scored 26 points, leading her team to victory and a state championship.
D9.zh: 她得了26分，带领球队获胜并夺得州冠军。

D7.en: She asked Sigrid to raid the pantry for her after being denied supper as punishment.
D7.zh: 她被罚不准吃晚饭，就让Sigrid去食品储藏室帮她偷吃的。

D6.en: She appeared in the 1929 yearbook team photo with six other women.
D6.zh: 她出现在1929年年鉴的团队照片里，和其他六名女性一起。

D2.en: As a teenager, she spent hours practicing basketball and pestered the boys' coach for advice.
D2.zh: 十几岁时，她花数小时练习篮球，并缠着男队教练请教。

M4.en: He said everything he tried hit a racial barrier.
M4.zh: 他说他尝试的每件事都遇到了种族障碍。

D16.en: He questioned his grandmother about why she hung a white Jesus on the wall.
D16.zh: 他质问祖母为什么在墙上挂一个白人耶稣。

D1.en: He began capitalizing on his naturally large intellect.
D1.zh: 他开始利用自己天生的大智慧。

D13b.en: He arrived on the Syracuse campus in fall 1953.
D13b.zh: 他于1953年秋天到达雪城大学校园。

D15.en: He made seven tackles in eleven plays.
D15.zh: 他在十一档进攻中完成了七次擒抱。

D4.en: He picked up a lacrosse stick out of curiosity and played with other boys, moving gracefully despite never having seen one before.
D4.zh: 他出于好奇拿起一根长曲棍球棒，和其他男孩一起玩，尽管从未见过，却动作优雅。

D6.en: He joined a group of tough Valley kids called the Gaylords.
D6.zh: 他加入了一帮来自山谷的硬核孩子，他们自称Gaylords。

D2.en: He practiced the same thing after practice on the street outside his home.
D2.zh: 他训练后在自家外面的街上练习同样的东西。

D12.en: His mother sent for him when he was eight.
D12.zh: 他八岁时，母亲把他接走了。

D14.en: He scored 53 points on a Tuesday and 55 on a Friday, breaking his own record.
D14.zh: 他在周二得了53分，周五得了55分，打破了自己的纪录。

D5.en: He entered a national decathlon championship with almost no training.
D5.zh: 他几乎未经训练就参加了全国十项全能锦标赛。

D20.en: At 16-17, he and his brother found a sponsor, grocer Rossi, boosting their club's pride.
D20.zh: 16到17岁时，他和兄弟找到了赞助商杂货商Rossi，提升了他们俱乐部的自豪感。

D1.en: At 17-18, he hit .632 in 18 games for Sunset Produce.
D1.zh: 17到18岁时，他在Sunset Produce的18场比赛中击出.632的打击率。

D14.en: At 18, he touched the rim of his cap in acknowledgement of the applause.
D14.zh: 18岁时，他触摸帽檐以回应掌声。

D13b.en: At 15-16, he dropped out of Galileo High after a year.
D13b.zh: 15到16岁时，他在伽利略高中读了一年后辍学。

D18.en: At 17-18, he became a hitter for hire, playing weekends and weekdays.
D18.zh: 17到18岁时，他成为雇佣击球手，周末和工作日都打球。

D5.en: At 18, he broke up a 0–0 tie and took a shutout from Babich in a Coast League game.
D5.zh: 18岁时，他打破了0比0的僵局，让Babich吞下完封败。

M1.en: He played to win.
M1.zh: 他打球就是为了赢。

D15.en: At 15, he was mostly legs and a head taller than his friends.
D15.zh: 15岁时，他主要是腿，比朋友们高一个头。

D7.en: As a teenager, he chose not to follow the family tradition, disappointing his father.
D7.zh: 十几岁时，他选择不继承家族传统，让他父亲失望了。

D3.en: As a small child, he and his friends used a boat paddle to hit a cloth ball tied with string.
D3.zh: 幼年时，他和朋友们用船桨击打绑着绳子的布球。

D12.en: At 13-15, he resisted his father's efforts to get him to join the family fishing business.
D12.zh: 13到15岁时，他抵制父亲让他加入家族渔业生意的努力。

D4.en: At 18, his sidearm throws would break seats behind first base.
D4.zh: 18岁时，他的侧投会打碎一垒后面的座位。

D19.en: At 14, he won the postseason Iona tournament with his team.
D19.zh: 14岁时，他和球队赢得了Iona赛季后锦标赛。

M3.en: At 14, Mr. Donohue made him pay close attention to Bill Russell.
M3.zh: 14岁时，Donohue先生让他密切关注Bill Russell。

M7.en: At 14, he had to play his absolute hardest; nothing else was acceptable.
M7.zh: 14岁时，他必须拼尽全力，其他都不行。

M6.en: At 14, he just wanted to pick up pointers and win at Power, not thinking about pro ball.
M6.zh: 14岁时，他只想学点技巧、赢下Power，没想过打职业。

M2.en: At 14, his parents were joyous in their understated way, and his confidence rose.
M2.zh: 14岁时，他的父母低调地高兴，他的信心也提升了。

D1.en: He won the city championship and made All-City and All-American.
D1.zh: 他赢得了城市冠军，并入选全市和全美最佳阵容。

M1.en: At 13, he was driven by the desire for display-case distinction.
M1.zh: 13岁时，他对展示柜里的荣誉充满渴望。

D15.en: He was six feet eight inches tall at age fourteen.
D15.zh: 他14岁时身高6英尺8英寸。

D4.en: At age 10, he studied a photo for months, never having seen anything like it.
D4.zh: 10岁时，他研究一张照片好几个月，从未见过类似的东西。

D9.en: At 14, Mr. Donohue gave him a varsity uniform and number 33.
D9.zh: 14岁时，多诺霍先生给了他一件校队球衣和33号球衣。

D7.en: At 14, he felt a thrill knowing he was beating his father.
D7.zh: 14岁时，知道自己在赢过父亲，他感到一阵兴奋。

D6.en: At 14, he hung out at Roy's coffee shop on Sugar Hill in Harlem.
D6.zh: 14岁时，他常去哈莱姆糖山156街和圣尼古拉斯大道的罗伊咖啡店玩。

D2.en: At 13, he practiced his jump shot the entire afternoon the day before.
D2.zh: 13岁时，他前一天整个下午都在练习跳投。

D3.en: As a small child to 13, he browsed and read magazines around the house.
D3.zh: 幼年到13岁间，他随手翻阅家里的杂志。

D12.en: At 17, he got a job at HARYOUACT as a reporter, earning $35 a week.
D12.zh: 17岁时，他申请到HARYOUACT的记者工作，每周赚35美元。

D17.en: At around 10-11, he was tall enough to grab a woman under the arm and take her to the side of the pool.
D17.zh: 他大约10到11岁时，个子高到能抓住一个女人的胳膊，把她带到泳池边。

M4.en: He felt intimate with the impulse to pick up a gun.
M4.zh: 他感到与拿起枪的冲动很亲近。

D16.en: He impressed his theater arts lecturer with his speaking ability.
D16.zh: 他给戏剧课讲师留下了能言善辩的印象。

D14.en: He covered Martin Luther King Jr.'s press conference and appeared in Jet magazine.
D14.zh: 他报道了马丁·路德·金的新闻发布会，并出现在《Jet》杂志上。

D13a.en: He made the decision to smoke pot.
D13a.zh: 他决定吸大麻。

D5.en: At 14, he shimmied up a drain pipe to sneak onto the subway when short on cash.
D5.zh: 14岁时，他顺着排水管爬上高架地铁站台，没钱时偷偷上车。

M3.en: At 15, he began to idolize Mikan.
M3.zh: 15岁时，他开始崇拜Mikan。

M6.en: At 18, in winter 1952, he had his basketball epiphany.
M6.zh: 18岁时，1952年冬天，他顿悟了篮球。

D1.en: At 18, upon graduating high school, he believed he had played his last organized game.
D1.zh: 18岁高中毕业时，他以为那是他最后一场正式篮球赛。

D18.en: As a child, he picked cotton and sometimes lived on government handouts.
D18.zh: 幼年时，他摘棉花，有时靠政府救济过活。

D5.en: At 14-15, he tried football and got cut, then got cut from varsity basketball.
D5.zh: 14到15岁时，他试踢橄榄球被刷，又被校篮球队刷掉。

D11.en: At about 15, he felt a warm surge of self-pride while waking or walking.
D11.zh: 大约15岁时，他在醒来或走路时感到一阵温暖的自豪。

D15.en: At 18, in January 1952, his career scoring high was only 14 points.
D15.zh: 18岁时，1952年1月，他的生涯最高分只有14分。

D9.en: At 17-18, by senior year he reached 6'5" and started at center.
D9.zh: 17到18岁时，高四他长到6英尺5英寸，打中锋首发。

D7.en: As a small child, he dressed in a sheet and made spooky sounds with his brother.
D7.zh: 幼年时，他和弟弟披着床单装鬼吓人。

D6.en: At 15-16, he borrowed two dollars from Powles to join the Boys Club for pickup games.
D6.zh: 15到16岁时，他找Powles借了两美元加入男孩俱乐部打野球。

D2.en: At 17, he bought a suit in September and outgrew it by January.
D2.zh: 17岁时，他9月买了套西装，到1月就穿不下了。
